We apply the proposed method to simulate potential energy surfaces for molecular dissociation and the activation energy of formaldehyde decomposition. Numerical results demonstrate that both FNO-OO-VQE and SVO-OO-VQE improve the variational accuracy while substantially reducing measurement cost.

AI.tldr: 提出基于轨道压缩的轨道优化VQE框架，通过FNO/SVO构建紧凑活性空间，结合轨道优化恢复电子关联效应，提高计算精度并降低测量成本。
AI.motivation: VQE在量子化学实际应用中面临挑战：有限的相干时间、不完美的量子门保真度、大量测量需求，导致当前电子结构模拟局限于较小的活性空间。
AI.method: 1) 使用冻结自然轨道(FNO)和分裂虚拟轨道(SVO)构建紧凑活性空间用于VQE模拟(FNO/SVO-VQE)；2) 结合轨道优化进一步恢复电子关联效应(FNO/SVO-OO-VQE)。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，FNO-OO-VQE和SVO-OO-VQE都能提高变分精度，同时显著降低测量成本，成功应用于分子解离势能面和甲醛分解活化能的模拟。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轨道优化VQE框架通过轨道压缩和优化技术，在保持较小活性空间的同时提高了电子结构计算的精度，为近期中尺度量子设备上的量子化学模拟提供了有效解决方案。

title: Intrinsic Topological Weyl Phase Transition Induced by a Magnetostructural Transformation in a Kagome Magnet
comment: 38 pages, 8 figures, and one supplemental information
summary: Topological phase transitions provide a unique window into the interplay between structure, magnetism, and Weyl physics in magnetic Weyl semimetals. However, realizing an intrinsic Weyl phase transition between two distinct Weyl states near room temperature remains challenging. Here, we demonstrate that a magnetostructural transition effectively induces such a transition in the kagome magnet Mn$_3$Ga. High-resolution neutron diffraction, magnetization characterizations and first-principles calculations reveal that Mn$_3$Ga undergoes a chiral antiferromagnetic transition below 485 K, followed by a magnetostructural transition to a monoclinic structure with highly canted antiferromagnetic order near room temperature. These cooperative changes in lattice and magnetic symmetries reorganize Weyl nodes, driving a transition from a primary type-II Weyl state to a distinct Weyl state, accompanied by dramatic variations in the anomalous Hall effect and appearance of topological Hall effect. Our findings open a new pathway for discovering novel topological Weyl states and potential spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: Mn3Ga经历磁结构相变，在室温附近实现从II型外尔态到另一种外尔态的拓扑相变，伴随异常霍尔效应和拓扑霍尔效应的显著变化。
AI.motivation: 在磁性外尔半金属中实现室温附近的本征外尔相变具有挑战性，但磁结构相变可能提供实现这种相变的新途径。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率中子衍射、磁化表征和第一性原理计算，研究Mn3Ga的磁结构相变及其对外尔物理的影响。
AI.result: Mn3Ga在485K以下经历手性反铁磁转变，在室温附近发生磁结构相变，晶格和磁对称性的协同变化重组外尔节点，驱动从主要II型外尔态到不同外尔态的转变。
AI.conclusion: 磁结构相变为发现新型拓扑外尔态和潜在自旋电子学应用开辟了新途径。

title: Emerging hierarchical dislocation structures: Insights from scanning electron microscopy-electron backscatter diffraction in situ tensile testing and multifractal analysis
summary: Understanding the evolution of dislocation structures during plastic deformation is critical for predicting the mechanical performance of metallic materials. In this work, we applied in situ scanning electron microscopy/electron backscatter diffraction tensile testing combined with multifractal (MF) analysis to assess deformation-induced dislocation structure evolution in solution-annealed 304L stainless steel, both in its as-received and neutron-irradiated states (5.4 displacements per atom). The analysis of kernel average misorientation patterns revealed the formation of hierarchical dislocation arrangements that exhibit clear MF scaling behavior. Despite pronounced visual differences between nonirradiated and irradiated specimens -- most notably, the appearance of dislocation channels after irradiation -- the singularity spectra suggest that both conditions give rise to similar underlying hierarchical structures. MF analysis provides a quantitative measure of the spatial complexity and self-organization of dislocation patterns, highlighting the accelerated emergence and evolution of the dislocation structures in irradiated polycrystalline materials, as well as the limitation of their spatial extent. The findings indicate that irradiation not only modifies microstructure but also alters correlation-driven dislocation organization. More generally, they demonstrate that MF analysis is a powerful tool for probing mesoscale deformation mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 利用多分形分析研究304L不锈钢在拉伸变形中位错结构的演化，发现辐照与非辐照样品的位错结构具有相似的分层组织特征。
AI.motivation: 理解塑性变形过程中位错结构的演化对于预测金属材料的力学性能至关重要，特别是辐照如何影响位错组织的形成和演化。
AI.method: 采用原位扫描电镜/电子背散射衍射拉伸测试结合多分形分析，研究溶液退火304L不锈钢在原始状态和5.4 dpa中子辐照状态下的变形诱导位错结构演化。
AI.result: 核平均取向差分析揭示了分层位错排列的形成，表现出明显的多分形标度行为。尽管辐照样品出现了位错通道等视觉差异，但奇异性谱表明两种条件都产生相似的底层分层结构。
AI.conclusion: 多分形分析为位错图案的空间复杂性和自组织提供了定量度量，表明辐照不仅改变微观结构，还改变相关性驱动的位错组织，是多尺度变形机制研究的强大工具。

title: Chern Insulator in magnetic-doped two-dimensional semiconductors
summary: We propose an approach to induce nontrivial bands with non-zero Chern numbers by utilizing strong spin-orbit coupling in transition metal dichalcogenides with dopants. We demonstrate that a doped state near the valence-band edge induces band inversion with the hybridized host band, leading to topologically non-trivial properties. Calculations for V-doped WSe2 and WS2 confirm this mechanism. The coexistence of magnetic order and nontrivial topology in these systems offers a promising platform for exploring the quantum anomalous Hall effect.

AI.tldr: 利用过渡金属二硫化物中的强自旋轨道耦合，通过掺杂诱导出具有非零陈数的非平庸能带，实现拓扑非平庸性质
AI.motivation: 探索在过渡金属二硫化物中通过掺杂实现拓扑非平庸能带的方法，为量子反常霍尔效应研究提供新平台
AI.method: 在WSe2和WS2中掺杂V原子，利用强自旋轨道耦合诱导价带边缘附近的掺杂态与宿主能带发生能带反转
AI.result: V掺杂的WSe2和WS2中成功实现了拓扑非平庸性质，证实了掺杂态诱导能带反转的机制
AI.conclusion: 该方法为同时实现磁序和拓扑非平庸性质提供了有前景的平台，可用于探索量子反常霍尔效应

title: AMELI: Angular Matrix Elements of Lanthanide Ions
summary: Matrix elements of spherical tensor operators are fundamental to the analysis of lanthanide spectra in both amorphous and crystalline host materials. In the intermediate coupling scheme, the eigenvectors of the Hamiltonian define the electronic structure, while the eigenvalues determine the energy levels of the $f^N$ configuration. By utilizing these eigenvectors to evaluate electric and magnetic dipole operators, one can identify the radiative line strengths for all transitions in both absorption and emission. This work presents a comprehensive framework for the direct calculation of angular matrix elements using a Slater determinant basis and their subsequent transformation to the traditional $LS$-coupling scheme. Unlike conventional indirect methods, this approach is more universally applicable, though it is computationally more intensive. A concise set of general rules is prepared to enable the calculation of angular matrix elements for virtually any spherical tensor operator within an $f^N$ configuration. The computational overhead of this direct approach is well within the capabilities of modern desktop computing. Furthermore, since these configuration-specific angular matrices are mathematical constants independent of the host environment, they need only be calculated once. The Python package AMELI is introduced, which employs exact arithmetic to generate the matrix elements with absolute mathematical precision. Both the underlying algorithms and the calculated matrices for all lanthanide ions are provided in open-access repositories. This removes a significant barrier for experimentalists, providing the necessary operator matrices without requiring them to navigate the intricate theory and algorithmic implementation.

AI.tldr: 开发了直接计算f^N构型球张量算符角矩阵元的方法和Python包AMELI，为镧系光谱分析提供精确的数学常数矩阵。
AI.motivation: 传统间接方法计算镧系离子f^N构型的球张量算符矩阵元存在局限性，需要更通用、精确的计算框架，以降低实验物理学家使用这些算符矩阵的门槛。
AI.method: 采用直接计算方法，基于Slater行列式基计算角矩阵元，然后变换到传统的LS耦合方案；开发Python包AMELI使用精确算术生成绝对数学精度的矩阵元。
AI.result: 建立了计算f^N构型任意球张量算符角矩阵元的通用规则；所有镧系离子的计算矩阵以开源形式提供；计算开销在现代桌面计算机可接受范围内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为镧系光谱分析提供了精确、通用的计算框架，AMELI包消除了实验物理学家使用复杂理论算法的障碍，配置特定的角矩阵作为数学常数只需计算一次。

title: Strict Entropy Decrease of Clausius Entropy in an Isolated System with Energy-Form Conversion: Theoretical Proof, Numerical Illustration, and Critical Examination
summary: This paper is accountable only to explicitly stated physical assumptions and strict logical inference. Its goal is to run a rigorous stress test of second-law claims within the Clausius framework. We work directly with \textbf{Clausius's entropy definition} for an isolated composite with energy-form conversion. Heat is withdrawn from a cold releasing subsystem with relatively small heat capacity, converted to electrical energy, and then delivered as heat to a hotter subsystem. In the ideal limit, the electrical leg contributes negligibly to Clausius entropy accounting, so the modeled reservoir Clausius sum is \[ ΔS_{\mathrm{Cl}} = Q\!\left(\frac{1}{T_B}-\frac{1}{T_A}\right) < 0. \] The paper provides a derivation, numerical illustrations, and a scope analysis; any claimed contradiction should be interpreted as a compatibility issue between different axiom sets, not as an algebraic error in the Clausius bookkeeping above.

AI.tldr: 该论文在克劳修斯框架内对第二定律主张进行严格压力测试，通过能量形式转换的孤立复合系统，展示克劳修斯熵计算可能为负的情况。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在基于明确物理假设和严格逻辑推理，在克劳修斯熵定义框架内对第二定律主张进行严格检验，揭示不同公理集之间的兼容性问题。
AI.method: 使用克劳修斯熵定义分析孤立复合系统，从冷释放子系统提取热量转换为电能，再以热量形式传递给较热子系统，在理想极限下计算克劳修斯熵变。
AI.result: 得到克劳修斯熵变 ΔS_Cl = Q(1/T_B - 1/T_A) < 0，表明在克劳修斯框架内可能出现熵减少的情况，这揭示了不同热力学公理集之间的兼容性问题。
AI.conclusion: 论文展示的克劳修斯熵减少并非代数错误，而是揭示了不同热力学公理集之间的兼容性问题，强调需要明确区分不同框架下的第二定律表述。

title: Machine-Learned Leftmost Hessian Eigenvectors for Robust Transition State Finding
summary: The reliable determination of transition states (TSs) benefits from second-order information for robust convergence and validation, but the computational expense of Hessians prohibits their routine use in TS optimization. Here, we present a machine-learning-driven TS optimizer that directly predicts the leftmost Hessian eigenvector (LMHE), the critical mode that locally approximates the reaction coordinate encompassing the TS. We demonstrate that our LMHE optimizer recovers TS solutions at the same rate as full Hessian optimizers, and more robustly from degraded initial guess geometries, thereby eliminating the excessively long wall times characteristic of full-Hessian approaches and reducing total gradient evaluations compared to standard quasi-Newton methods. We further improve accuracy and robustness using uncertainty quantification for identifying occasional LMHE prediction failures, that then falls back to a full Hessian update from the machine learned potential at that optimization step, avoiding expensive active learning. Overall our methodology and semi-automated workflow delivers second-order stability at first-order computational expense to provide a highly efficient engine for high-throughput reaction discovery.

AI.tldr: 机器学习驱动的过渡态优化器，通过预测Hessian矩阵最左特征向量来替代昂贵的二阶计算，实现二阶稳定性但仅需一阶计算成本
AI.motivation: 过渡态（TS）的可靠确定需要二阶信息（Hessian矩阵）以确保稳健收敛和验证，但Hessian矩阵的计算成本过高，阻碍了其在TS优化中的常规使用
AI.method: 开发机器学习驱动的TS优化器，直接预测Hessian矩阵最左特征向量（LMHE）——这是近似反应坐标的关键模式；使用不确定性量化识别预测失败情况，必要时回退到机器学习势能的全Hessian更新
AI.result: LMHE优化器恢复TS解的速率与全Hessian优化器相同，且从劣质初始几何结构恢复更稳健；消除了全Hessian方法的过长计算时间，相比标准拟牛顿方法减少了总梯度评估次数
AI.conclusion: 该方法和工作流程以二阶稳定性但仅需一阶计算成本，为高通量反应发现提供了高效引擎

title: Tracking the local order parameter through the Hubbard exciton decoherence time in the Mott-Hubbard insulator LaVO3
summary: The prototypical Mott-Hubbard insulator LaVO3 undergoes a structural phase transition accompanied by the onset of spin and orbital ordering below 140 K. By combining ultrafast optical pump-probe spectroscopy and two-dimensional electronic spectroscopy, we investigate the interplay between fluctuations of the local spin and orbital order parameter and the lifetime of high-energy electron-hole excitations. Specifically, we demonstrate that the pump-induced perturbation of the order parameter leads to a change of the Hubbard exciton decoherence time and, consequently, of its homogeneous linewidth. Dynamical mean-field theory calculations confirm that the exciton scattering rate is crucially affected by the degree of order of the spin and orbital lattices in LaVO3. Our results demonstrate that multi-dimensional ultrafast optical spectroscopy can be used to track the dynamics of the order parameter, thus opening new routes in the study of correlated quantum materials characterized by intertwined orders.

AI.tldr: 通过超快光学光谱技术研究LaVO3中自旋和轨道有序参数涨落对Hubbard激子退相干时间的影响，展示了多维超快光谱可用于追踪有序参数动力学。
AI.motivation: 研究关联量子材料中相互交织的有序参数动力学，特别是自旋和轨道有序涨落对高能电子-空穴激发寿命的影响，探索新的研究途径。
AI.method: 结合超快光学泵浦-探测光谱和二维电子光谱技术，研究LaVO3中泵浦诱导的有序参数扰动对Hubbard激子退相干时间的影响，并通过动力学平均场理论计算验证。
AI.result: 泵浦诱导的有序参数扰动导致Hubbard激子退相干时间变化，从而改变其均匀线宽。理论计算证实激子散射率受自旋和轨道晶格有序度显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 多维超快光学光谱可用于追踪有序参数动力学，为研究具有相互交织有序的关联量子材料开辟了新途径。

title: Crystal Growth and anisotropic magneto-transport properties of semimetallic LaNiSb3
summary: Single crystals of LaNiSb$_3$ were grown using the Sn flux method. Structural characterization confirms that LaNiSb$_3$ crystallizes in the orthorhombic $Pbcm$ space group with lattice parameters $a = 13.0970(2)\,\mathrmÅ$, $b = 6.1400(4)\,\mathrmÅ$, and $c = 12.1270(4)\,\mathrmÅ$. Electrical resistivity measurements demonstrate metallic behavior over the entire temperature range of 3--300~K. The magnetoresistance exhibits a positive anisotropic response, attaining a maximum of $\sim 8\%$ for $H \parallel b$, with a pronounced crossover from quadratic to nearly linear field dependence. Angular-dependent MR measurements reveal a pronounced twofold symmetry upon magnetic field rotation within both the $ab$ and $ac$ crystallographic planes up to 50~K, indicating anisotropic charge transport. Hall resistivity measurements show predominantly electron-type conduction at high temperatures, with an increasing hole contribution upon cooling. The multiband character is further corroborated by the violation of Kohler's scaling and is well described within a semiclassical two-band framework. Collectively, these results suggest that LaNiSb$_3$ exhibits anisotropic multiband electronic transport and is a compelling candidate for exploring structure--property correlations in topological semimetals.

AI.tldr: LaNiSb₃单晶通过Sn助熔剂法生长，具有正交晶系Pbcm空间群结构，表现出金属性电输运、各向异性正磁阻和双能带特征，是研究拓扑半金属结构-性质关联的有前景候选材料。
AI.motivation: 研究LaNiSb₃的晶体结构和电子输运性质，探索其在拓扑半金属领域的潜在应用价值，特别是理解其各向异性多能带电子输运行为与结构特征之间的关联。
AI.method: 采用Sn助熔剂法生长LaNiSb₃单晶，通过结构表征确定其晶体结构，在3-300K温度范围内进行电阻率、磁阻、角依赖磁阻和霍尔电阻率等电输运测量，利用半经典双能带模型分析数据。
AI.result: LaNiSb₃结晶为正交晶系Pbcm空间群，晶格参数为a=13.0970Å, b=6.1400Å, c=12.1270Å。电阻率显示金属行为，磁阻呈现各向异性正响应，最高达8%（H∥b），霍尔测量表明高温下主要为电子型导电，低温空穴贡献增加，违反Kohler标度律证实多能带特征。
AI.conclusion: LaNiSb₃表现出各向异性多能带电子输运特性，是研究拓扑半金属中结构-性质关联的有力候选材料，其电输运行为可通过半经典双能带模型很好地描述。

title: Super-Klein tunneling in 2D Lorentzian-type barriers in graphene
summary: We introduce a two-dimensional model of spin-1/2 Dirac fermions in graphene subjected to a highly tunable electric field, which exhibits super-Klein tunneling. The electric field can be continuously interpolated between two limiting configurations: a uniform electrostatic Lorentzian barrier with translational invariance and a chain of well-separated electrostatic scatterers. We demonstrate that super-Klein tunneling arises naturally as a direct consequence of the intrinsic connection of the model to free-particle dynamics, a relation that is established through methods of supersymmetric quantum mechanics, which provide an elegant and analytically tractable framework. Besides the mentioned super-Klein tunneling, scale invariance of the model and invisibility of the potential for particles of specific energy are revealed, and possible routes toward experimental realization are discussed.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种二维石墨烯中自旋-1/2狄拉克费米子的可调电场模型，展示了超克莱因隧穿现象，并通过超对称量子力学方法建立了与自由粒子动力学的内在联系。
AI.motivation: 研究石墨烯中狄拉克费米子在可调电场下的量子输运特性，特别是探索超克莱因隧穿现象及其与自由粒子动力学的内在联系。
AI.method: 采用二维自旋-1/2狄拉克费米子模型，构建高度可调的电场配置（从均匀静电洛伦兹势垒到分离静电散射链），运用超对称量子力学方法建立与自由粒子动力学的解析联系。
AI.result: 发现了超克莱因隧穿现象，揭示了模型的尺度不变性，以及特定能量粒子对势的不可见性，建立了模型与自由粒子动力学的直接联系。
AI.conclusion: 超克莱因隧穿是模型与自由粒子动力学内在联系的直接结果，超对称量子力学提供了优雅的解析框架，该模型具有实验实现的可能途径。

title: Intermittent Sub-grid Wave Correction from Differentiated Riemann Variables
summary: We introduce a low-cost every-$K$-step correction for one-dimensional Euler computations. The correction uses differentiated Riemann variables (DRVs) -- characteristic derivatives that isolate the left acoustic wave, the contact, and the right acoustic wave -- to locate the current wave packet, sample the surrounding constant states, perform a short Newton update for the intermediate pressure and contact speed, and conservatively remap a sharpened profile back onto the grid. The ingredients are elementary -- filtered centered differences, local state sampling, a single Newton step, and conservative cell averaging -- yet the effect on accuracy is disproportionate. On a long-time severe-expansion benchmark ($N=900$, $t=0.4$), intermittent correction drives the intermediate-state errors from $O(10^{-2})$ to $O(10^{-13})$, i.e. to machine precision. On a long-time LeBlanc benchmark ($N=800$, $t=1$), the method crosses a qualitative threshold: one-shot final-time reconstruction fails entirely (shock location error $2.7\times 10^{-1}$), whereas correction every three steps recovers an almost exact sharp solution with contact and shock positions accurate to machine precision. The same detector-and-Newton mechanism handles two-shock and two-rarefaction packets without case-specific logic, with plateau improvements of four to sixteen orders of magnitude. In an unoptimized Python prototype the wall-clock overhead is below a factor of two even on the most aggressively corrected benchmark. To our knowledge, no comparably lightweight fixed-grid add-on has been shown to recover this level of coarse-grid accuracy on the long-time LeBlanc and related near-vacuum problems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种低成本每K步校正方法，使用微分黎曼变量定位波包，通过牛顿更新和保守重映射提高一维欧拉计算精度，在粗网格上实现接近机器精度的解。
AI.motivation: 传统一维欧拉计算在长时间模拟中，特别是在LeBlanc和近真空问题等基准测试中，难以在粗网格上获得高精度解。现有方法要么计算成本高，要么无法有效处理这些具有挑战性的问题。
AI.method: 使用微分黎曼变量（DRVs）定位当前波包，采样周围恒定状态，通过单步牛顿更新计算中间压力和接触速度，然后将锐化后的剖面保守地重映射到网格上。方法包含滤波中心差分、局部状态采样、单步牛顿迭代和保守单元平均等基本元素。
AI.result: 在长时间严重膨胀基准测试中，中间状态误差从O(10^{-2})降低到O(10^{-13})（机器精度）。在长时间LeBlanc基准测试中，每三步校正恢复了几乎精确的锐化解，接触和激波位置精度达到机器精度。对两激波和两稀疏波包处理效果显著，精度提升4-16个数量级，未优化Python原型的计算开销低于两倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种轻量级固定网格附加方案，能够在粗网格上恢复长时间LeBlanc和相关近真空问题的高精度解，计算开销低，无需特定情况逻辑，具有广泛应用潜力。

title: Materials Beyond Hamiltonian Limits -- Quantum Measurement as a Resource for Material Design
summary:
Recent studies have identified materials and devices whose behavior lies beyond the scope of conventional electronic-structure theory. Such theories are formulated entirely in terms of Hamiltonian evolution and therefore describe only unitary dynamics and thus only a restricted class of quantum systems.
  In contrast, electron systems that incorporate quantum measurement as an intrinsic dynamical element undergo Hamiltonian evolution interleaved with projection-induced state updates. This unitary-projective dynamics breaks constraints imposed by purely unitary evolution and permits stochastic population transfer between symmetry-related transport channels, thereby enabling fundamentally new material functionalities. This insight motivates the deliberate design of materials and devices that harness unitary-projective dynamics.
  This article explores the foundations of unitary-projective electron dynamics and charts the resulting landscape of quantum materials and their functionalities. Model calculations demonstrate passive mesoscopic structures with intrinsic nonreciprocal single-electron transmission, materials exhibiting a novel category of magnetism, and possible platforms for energy harvesting and conversion with efficiencies that exceed the standard Carnot limit.

AI.tldr: 论文提出超越传统电子结构理论的新框架，将量子测量作为固有动力学元素，实现哈密顿演化与投影态更新的交织，为设计新型量子材料和器件开辟新路径。
AI.motivation: 传统电子结构理论仅描述幺正动力学，无法涵盖包含量子测量作为固有动力学元素的电子系统。这类系统表现出超越幺正演化约束的新行为，为实现全新材料功能提供了可能性。
AI.method: 提出幺正-投影电子动力学框架，将哈密顿演化与投影诱导的态更新交织。通过模型计算展示被动介观结构、新型磁性材料以及能量收集转换平台的设计原理。
AI.result: 展示了具有固有非互易单电子传输的被动介观结构、展现新型磁性类别的材料，以及可能超越标准卡诺极限效率的能量收集和转换平台。
AI.conclusion: 幺正-投影动力学打破了纯幺正演化的约束，允许对称相关传输通道间的随机粒子数转移，为实现全新材料功能提供了理论基础，为量子材料和器件的设计开辟了新方向。

title: TERS-ABNet: A Deep Learning Approach for Automated Single-Molecule Structure Reconstruction with Atomic Precision from TERS Mapping
summary: Determining the chemical structure for a single molecule on surface from spectroscopic data represents a challenging high-dimensional inverse problem. Tip-enhanced Raman spectroscopy (TERS) enables chemically specific imaging of single molecules with sub-nanometer spatial resolution, yet reconstructing complete molecular structures from TERS maps remains difficult owing to the ambiguous vibrational signatures and reliance on expert interpretation. Here, we introduce TERS-ABNet, a deep-learning framework that formulates single-molecule structure determination from spectroscopic images as an image-to-graph inference task. Using a "two-track" architecture, the model jointly predicts probabilistic atom and bond maps, enabling direct construction of explicit atom-bond graphs without relying on predefined chemical rules. Trained on simulated datasets, TERS-ABNet achieves about 94% atom-type classification accuracy (with a mean coordinate error of about 0.23 Å), enabling to reliably recovering molecular connectivity and fully reconstruct single-molecule structure from its TERS maps. The framework generalizes across varying spatial resolutions and structural complexity through transfer learning, and successfully reconstructs the atomic structure of a single porphyrin molecule from experimental TERS data. This work establishes a general deep-learning strategy for inferring explicit atom-bond graph representations from high-dimensional spectroscopic imaging data, providing a new pathway towards automated molecular structure determination in nanoscale characterization.

AI.tldr: TERS-ABNet：一个深度学习框架，能够从尖端增强拉曼光谱图像中直接推断原子-键图，实现单分子结构的自动重建。
AI.motivation: 从光谱数据确定表面单分子化学结构是一个具有挑战性的高维逆问题。虽然尖端增强拉曼光谱能够以亚纳米分辨率对单分子进行化学特异性成像，但由于振动信号模糊和依赖专家解释，从TERS图谱重建完整分子结构仍然困难。
AI.method: 提出TERS-ABNet深度学习框架，将单分子结构确定从光谱图像转化为图像到图的推理任务。采用"双轨"架构，模型联合预测概率性原子图和键图，无需依赖预定义化学规则即可直接构建明确的原子-键图。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集上训练，TERS-ABNet达到约94%的原子类型分类准确率（平均坐标误差约0.23 Å），能够可靠恢复分子连接性并从TERS图谱完全重建单分子结构。通过迁移学习框架可泛化到不同空间分辨率和结构复杂度，并成功从实验TERS数据重建了单个卟啉分子的原子结构。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作建立了一种通用的深度学习策略，用于从高维光谱成像数据推断明确的原子-键图表示，为纳米尺度表征中的自动化分子结构确定提供了新途径。

title: Role of interstitial $s$ orbital in a model of infinite-layer nickelates
summary: Motivated by recent angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) experiments on infinite-layer (IL) nickelates, we employ determinant quantum Monte Carlo (DQMC) to study the three-orbital Emery model ($d$-$p$ model) coupled to an additional interstitial $s$ orbital retaining the three-dimensional dispersion. Our large-scale simulations reveal that: (1) the interstitial $s$-orbital-derived electron pocket is significantly reduced by the strong interaction but persists upon 20\% hole doping, reaching a size comparable to experimental observations; (2) the $d_{x^2-y^2}$-orbital dispersion is strongly renormalized by interactions, leading to a weak $k_z$ dependence consistent with ARPES measurements. Furthermore, compared with the conventional three-orbital $d$-$p$ model, the $d$-$p$-$s$ model exhibits enhanced short-range antiferromagnetic correlations. These results highlight the crucial role of strong correlations and multi-orbital effects in shaping the low-energy electronic structure and many-body correlations in IL nickelates, and demonstrate the necessity of treating interaction-driven many-body physics within a realistic multi-orbital framework.

AI.tldr: 使用DQMC研究无限层镍酸盐的三轨道Emery模型，发现间隙s轨道电子口袋在强相互作用下显著减小但持续存在，d轨道色散被强烈重整化，且d-p-s模型增强了短程反铁磁关联。
AI.motivation: 受到无限层镍酸盐角分辨光电子能谱实验的启发，研究强相互作用和多轨道效应对其低能电子结构和多体关联的影响。
AI.method: 采用行列式量子蒙特卡洛方法研究三轨道Emery模型（d-p模型），耦合额外的间隙s轨道并保持三维色散。
AI.result: 1) 间隙s轨道电子口袋在强相互作用下显著减小但在20%空穴掺杂下持续存在，尺寸与实验观测相当；2) d_{x^2-y^2}轨道色散被强烈重整化，k_z依赖性弱，与ARPES测量一致；3) d-p-s模型相比传统三轨道d-p模型增强了短程反铁磁关联。
AI.conclusion: 强关联和多轨道效应在塑造无限层镍酸盐低能电子结构和多体关联中起关键作用，需要在现实多轨道框架内处理相互作用驱动的多体物理。

title: Electric-field-induced X-ray Nonreciprocal Dichroism in Hematite
summary: Hematite (alpha-Fe2O3) is a prototypical room temperature antiferromagnet whose time-reversal-odd magnetic structure has recently attracted renewed attention. While such magnetic symmetry can be characterized in terms of higher-order multipoles beyond the magnetic dipole, their manifestation in measurable physical phenomena has remained largely elusive. In this work, we investigate x-ray absorption near the Fe K-edge of hematite under an applied electric field, which explicitly breaks space-inversion symmetry. We observe an electric-field-induced x-ray nonreciprocal linear dichroism (E-induced XNLD) that reflects the time-reversal-odd nature of the magnetic order. Numerical simulations based on ab-initio density functional theory reproduce the observed spectra, including their dependence on the antiferromagnetic domain and x-ray polarization. Furthermore, a symmetry-resolved multipole analysis reveals that this response originates from the magnetic quadrupole and the magnetic toroidal octupole induced by the applied electric field. These results demonstrate that electric-field-modulated x-ray absorption provides direct access to the antiferroic order of higher-order multipoles in time-reversal-odd antiferromagnets, thereby establishing a general framework to uncover hidden symmetry properties in magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 在赤铁矿中观察到电场诱导的X射线非互易线性二色性，揭示了时间反演奇性磁序，源于电场诱导的磁四极子和磁环形八极子。
AI.motivation: 赤铁矿作为典型的室温反铁磁体，其时间反演奇性磁结构可以通过高阶多极子描述，但这些多极子在可测量物理现象中的表现仍不清楚。研究旨在探索电场如何调控X射线吸收以揭示这些隐藏的对称性。
AI.method: 在赤铁矿Fe K-edge附近进行X射线吸收测量，施加电场破坏空间反演对称性，观察电场诱导的X射线非互易线性二色性。结合基于第一性原理密度泛函理论的数值模拟，分析光谱对反铁磁畴和X射线偏振的依赖性，并进行对称性解析的多极子分析。
AI.result: 观察到电场诱导的X射线非互易线性二色性，反映了磁序的时间反演奇性。数值模拟成功再现了观测光谱，多极子分析表明该响应源于电场诱导的磁四极子和磁环形八极子。
AI.conclusion: 电场调制的X射线吸收为直接探测时间反演奇性反铁磁体中高阶多极子的反铁电序提供了途径，建立了揭示磁性材料隐藏对称性性质的通用框架。

title: Equilibrium Magnetic Properties in Magnetic Nanoscrews
summary: We investigate the equilibrium magnetization in ferromagnetic nanoscrews (NSw) using micromagnetic simulations. These systems consist of elongated three-dimensional magnetic membranes with helicoidal geometry, combining curvature, torsion ($\mathrm{w}$), and eccentricity ($ε$) along their length. We focus on the influence of these geometric parameters, together with membrane thickness and inner diameter, on remanent states and coercive fields. Our results, obtained over a broad range of eccentricities and torsions, reveal bistable magnetic behavior, with vortex-domain-wall propagation during magnetization reversal. We identify four degenerate configurations of a remarkably stable mixed remanent state. The coercive field is found to increase with eccentricity for structures with a major axis (larger inner diameter) approximately 30\% larger than the minor axis (smaller inner diameter), while remaining largely insensitive to variations in torsion. These findings are interpreted in terms of geometry-induced modifications of surface magnetostatic charges on the membrane mantle. Overall, our results demonstrate that nanoscrews exhibit robust bistability under systematic geometric deformation, together with enhanced coercivity, highlighting their potential for applications in three-dimensional nanomagnetism.

AI.tldr: 研究通过微磁模拟探究铁磁纳米螺丝的平衡磁化，分析几何参数（曲率、扭转、偏心度、厚度、内径）对剩磁态和矫顽场的影响，发现双稳态磁行为和增强的矫顽力。
AI.motivation: 研究三维磁性纳米螺丝的几何参数如何影响其磁性能，探索这些具有螺旋几何形状的纳米结构在三维纳米磁学中的潜在应用价值。
AI.method: 采用微磁模拟方法，系统研究铁磁纳米螺丝的几何参数，包括曲率、扭转(ω)、偏心度(ε)、膜厚度和内径，分析这些参数对剩磁态和矫顽场的影响。
AI.result: 发现双稳态磁行为，磁化反转过程中出现涡旋-畴壁传播；识别出四种简并的混合剩磁态配置；矫顽场随偏心度增加而增加（当长轴比短轴大约30%时），但对扭转变化不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 纳米螺丝在系统几何变形下表现出鲁棒的双稳态和增强的矫顽力，这些特性源于几何诱导的膜表面磁静电荷修饰，显示了在三维纳米磁学应用中的潜力。

title: Development and large-scale benchmarks of a protein-ligand absolute binding free energy toolkit
summary: Absolute binding free energy (ABFE) calculations offer a theoretically rigorous approach for predicting protein--ligand binding affinities without the scaffold constraints of relative binding free energy (RBFE) perturbations. However, broad adoption of ABFE in high-throughput hit discovery campaigns has been hindered by high computational costs and a lack of large-scale validation. Here, we present Felis, an open-source, automated, and scalable toolkit designed for high-throughput ABFE calculations. Paired with ByteFF, a previously developed data-driven molecular mechanics force field for drug-like molecules, Felis achieves ranking performance comparable to state-of-the-art RBFE methods on a diverse dataset comprising 43 protein targets and 859 ligands. Furthermore, we demonstrate robust convergence and ranking performance of Felis on a more challenging KRAS(G12D) dataset, where some ligands and the cofactor are highly charged. Crucially, all Felis predictions in this study were generated in a strict zero-shot manner, eschewing custom force-field modifications and alchemical schedule fine-tuning. This demonstrates the viability of Felis as an effective, ready-to-use tool for computational structure-based drug design.

AI.tldr: Felis是一个开源、自动化、可扩展的绝对结合自由能计算工具包，与ByteFF力场结合，在43个蛋白靶点和859个配体上达到与最先进相对结合自由能方法相当的排名性能，无需定制化调整。
AI.motivation: 绝对结合自由能计算理论上严谨但计算成本高且缺乏大规模验证，限制了其在高通量药物发现中的应用。需要开发一个高效、可扩展的ABFE工具来克服这些障碍。
AI.method: 开发了Felis开源工具包，结合之前开发的ByteFF数据驱动分子力学力场，实现自动化高通量ABFE计算。所有预测均在严格的零样本方式下进行，避免定制力场修改和炼金术计划微调。
AI.result: 在包含43个蛋白靶点和859个配体的多样化数据集上，Felis的排名性能与最先进的RBFE方法相当。在更具挑战性的KRAS(G12D)数据集上（包含高电荷配体和辅因子），Felis也表现出稳健的收敛性和排名性能。
AI.conclusion: Felis作为一个有效、即用的计算结构药物设计工具，展示了绝对结合自由能计算在高通量药物发现中的可行性，无需复杂的定制化调整。

title: The Nonintrinsic Sector of Landau Theory
summary: Landau theory usually treats free-energy coefficients as intrinsic parameters fixed by thermodynamic variables. We show that externally written microscale fields can survive coarse graining and enter the free-energy functional as spatially prescribed coefficient fields. This defines a nonintrinsic sector of Landau theory. The key condition is a hierarchy of correlation, writing, and frustration lengths. We identify ion-patterned FeRh as a plausible realization.

AI.tldr: 传统朗道理论将自由能系数视为由热力学变量固定的内禀参数，本文证明外部写入的微观尺度场可以在粗粒化后作为空间规定的系数场进入自由能泛函，从而定义了朗道理论的非内禀部分。
AI.motivation: 传统朗道理论假设自由能系数是内禀的、由热力学变量决定的参数。本文旨在探索外部写入的微观尺度场是否能在粗粒化过程中存活，并作为空间变化的系数场进入自由能泛函，从而扩展朗道理论的应用范围。
AI.method: 通过建立关联长度、写入长度和挫败长度之间的层次关系，证明外部写入的微观场可以在粗粒化过程中存活。理论框架基于朗道理论的扩展，考虑空间变化的系数场。以离子图案化的FeRh作为具体实现案例进行分析。
AI.result: 证明了外部写入的微观尺度场确实可以在粗粒化后作为空间规定的系数场进入自由能泛函，从而定义了朗道理论的非内禀部分。关键条件是关联长度、写入长度和挫败长度之间的层次关系。离子图案化的FeRh被识别为这一理论的潜在实现系统。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了朗道理论，引入了非内禀部分，其中自由能系数可以是外部写入的空间变化场。这一理论框架为控制材料性质提供了新途径，特别是在离子图案化系统中，为设计具有空间调制性质的材料开辟了可能性。

title: olLOSC: Unified and efficient density functional approximation to correct delocalization error in molecules and periodic materials
comment: Manuscript: 25 pages, 1 figure; supplemental: 33 pages, 7 figures
summary: Density functional theory (DFT) is the most promising method for calculating quantum properties of molecules and materials at moderate and large scales. However, commonly used density functional approximations (DFAs) have systematic delocalization error, as demonstrated by underestimated band gaps, over-delocalized charges, and energy level misalignment at interfaces, which limits its quantitative prediction. Extensive efforts, such as the $GW$ approximation to many-body perturbation theory, system-specific tuning of DFA parameters, and correction functionals have been developed to address delocalization error. However, an accurate, efficient, and unified solution to describe total energy, charge density and band structure for both finite systems and materials is still not available. Building on the linear-response localized orbital scaling correction (lrLOSC), we introduce olLOSC: a localized orbital scaling correction with curvature calculated by orbital-free electronic linear response. olLOSC has comparable accuracy to lrLOSC, but is much more computationally efficient. olLOSC corrects delocalization error - especially underestimated gaps, but also the total energy - both in molecules and in materials with small and moderate band gaps, within the same orbital-free approximation. Critically, with a a unified approximation, olLOSC opens the path for robust and efficient DFT applications across molecules, materials, and interfaces.

AI.tldr: 提出olLOSC方法，通过轨道无关的电子线性响应计算曲率，以校正DFT中的离域误差，在保持准确性的同时大幅提升计算效率，为分子、材料和界面提供统一的DFT校正方案。
AI.motivation: DFT是计算分子和材料量子性质的重要方法，但常用的密度泛函近似存在系统性离域误差，导致带隙低估、电荷过度离域和界面能级错位等问题。虽然已有GW近似、参数调优和校正泛函等方法，但仍缺乏一个能同时准确描述有限系统和材料的总能量、电荷密度和能带结构的统一高效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于线性响应局域轨道标度校正(lrLOSC)，提出olLOSC方法，通过轨道无关的电子线性响应计算曲率。该方法在保持与lrLOSC相当准确性的同时，大幅提高了计算效率，能够校正分子和中小带隙材料中的离域误差。
AI.result: olLOSC能够有效校正离域误差，特别是低估的带隙问题，同时也能校正总能量。该方法在分子和中小带隙材料中均表现出良好性能，且计算效率显著高于lrLOSC。
AI.conclusion: olLOSC通过统一的近似方法，为分子、材料和界面的DFT应用提供了稳健且高效的校正方案，有望推动DFT在更广泛领域的应用。

title: Many-body electronic structure, self-doped double-exchange, and Hund metallicity in 1T-CrTe2 bulk and monolayer
summary: The van der Waals (vdW) ferromagnet 1T-CrTe2 is an emerging spintronics platform, notable for its high Curie temperature (Tc) and intriguing transport properties. However, the fundamental interplay between the electron correlations and magnetism underlying its high Tc still remains elusive. Here, using density functional theory plus dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT), we identify 1T-CrTe2 as a self-doped double-exchange ferromagnet with pronounced Hund metallicity. This identification is grounded in the first detailed analysis of its many-body electronic structure, which reveals a dual electronic nature of Cr-d orbitals where itinerant eg electrons coexist with localized t2g moments. The interaction between these orbitals, mediated by Hund's coupling, drives the double-exchange ferromagnetism, establishing 1T-CrTe2 as a Hund metal reminiscent of orbital-selective Mott systems. In the monolayer limit, while this physical picture persists, structural deformation, rather than reduced dimensionality, notably reduces Tc.Our findings offer a new perspective on the high-Tc ferromagnetism in 1T-CrTe2, a mechanism potentially pivotal for other correlated two-dimensional vdW metallic magnets.

AI.tldr: 1T-CrTe2是一种自掺杂双交换铁磁体，具有显著的洪德金属性，其高居里温度源于洪德耦合驱动的双交换机制，而非维度效应。
AI.motivation: 尽管1T-CrTe2作为vdW铁磁体具有高居里温度和有趣的输运性质，但其电子关联与磁性之间的相互作用机制仍不清楚，需要深入理解其高Tc的物理起源。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论加动态平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）方法，首次详细分析了1T-CrTe2的多体电子结构，揭示了Cr-d轨道的双重电子性质。
AI.result: 发现1T-CrTe2是自掺杂双交换铁磁体，具有洪德金属性特征：Cr-d轨道中巡游的eg电子与局域的t2g磁矩共存，洪德耦合介导的相互作用驱动双交换铁磁性。单层情况下物理图像保持不变，但结构变形（而非维度降低）显著降低Tc。
AI.conclusion: 研究为1T-CrTe2的高Tc铁磁性提供了新视角，这种洪德耦合驱动的双交换机制可能对其他相关二维vdW金属磁体也至关重要。

title: Temperature-dependent vibrational EELS simulations with nuclear quantum effects
summary: The Time Autocorrelation of Auxiliary Wave (TACAW) method has established a framework for modeling angle-resolved electron energy loss spectroscopy (EELS) of phonons and magnons by deriving scattering intensities from the time autocorrelation of the beam wavefunction. This approach enables efficient computation of scattering intensities while naturally accounting for dynamical diffraction and multiple-scattering effects. In the cryogenic regime, vibrational spectra are dominated by nuclear quantum effects, notably zero-point motion. To capture these effects in low-temperature vibrational EELS, we incorporate thermostatted ring polymer molecular dynamics (TRPMD) into the TACAW formalism. Our results demonstrate that nuclear quantum effects lead to significant deviations from classical molecular dynamics predictions in the vibrational spectra of silicon at low temperatures and correctly predict the nearly temperature-independent optical phonon peak intensities in silicon, consistent with the first Born approximation. The TRPMD-TACAW method provides a robust theoretical tool for probing the low-temperature limit of vibrational EELS, offering a necessary benchmark for the quantitative analysis of emerging cryogenic scanning transmission electron microscopy experiments.

AI.tldr: 将热浴环形聚合物分子动力学(TRPMD)整合到时间自相关辅助波(TACAW)方法中，用于模拟低温下考虑核量子效应的振动电子能量损失谱。
AI.motivation: 在低温条件下，振动光谱受核量子效应（特别是零点运动）主导，而经典分子动力学无法准确预测这些效应。需要开发能够捕捉低温下核量子效应的理论工具来支持新兴的低温扫描透射电子显微镜实验。
AI.method: 将热浴环形聚合物分子动力学(TRPMD)整合到时间自相关辅助波(TACAW)形式中。TACAW方法通过推导束波函数的时间自相关来计算散射强度，TRPMD则用于模拟核量子效应。
AI.result: 核量子效应导致硅在低温下的振动光谱与经典分子动力学预测存在显著偏差。TRPMD-TACAW方法正确预测了硅中光学声子峰强度几乎与温度无关的特性，这与第一玻恩近似一致。
AI.conclusion: TRPMD-TACAW方法为探测振动电子能量损失谱的低温极限提供了稳健的理论工具，为新兴的低温扫描透射电子显微镜实验的定量分析提供了必要的基准。

title: Semiclassical Wave-Packet Dynamics in Phase-Space Geometry: Quantum Metric Effects
summary: Quantum geometry governs a wide range of transport and optical phenomena in quantum materials. Recent works have explored analogue electromagnetism and gravity in terms of the quantum geometric tensor, whose real and imaginary parts correspond to the quantum metric and the Berry curvature. By treating real- and momentum-space geometries on an equal footing, we develop a comprehensive and general formalism based on an expansion in $\hbar$, equivalent to an expansion in spatial derivatives. We derive the quantum-metric corrections to the wave-packet energy, the Berry connection, and the phase-space density of states, similar to the field-induced corrections in nonlinear response. A kinetic equation that captures quantum-metric effects across the full phase space then follows naturally. We further identify a polarization induced by gradients of the metric and a linear Hall response originating from its mixed components. Our framework provides a foundation for investigating thermodynamic and transport properties in systems where real- and momentum-space quantum geometries coexist.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ℏ展开的量子几何统一形式体系，将实空间和动量空间几何平等处理，推导了量子度规对波包能量、贝里联络和相空间态密度的修正，建立了包含量子度规效应的全相空间动力学方程。
AI.motivation: 量子几何在量子材料的输运和光学现象中起关键作用。现有研究将模拟电磁学和引力与量子几何张量联系起来，但其实空间和动量空间几何的处理需要统一框架，以研究两者共存系统中的热力学和输运性质。
AI.method: 采用基于ℏ展开的形式体系（等价于空间导数展开），将实空间和动量空间几何平等处理。推导量子度规对波包能量、贝里联络和相空间态密度的修正，建立包含量子度规效应的全相空间动力学方程。
AI.result: 发现了由度规梯度诱导的极化效应和源于其混合分量的线性霍尔响应。该框架为研究实空间和动量空间量子几何共存系统的热力学和输运性质提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一个统一的量子几何形式体系，能够系统处理实空间和动量空间几何的相互作用，为理解量子材料中复杂的输运现象提供了新的理论工具。

title: Comment on: Discontinuous codimension-two bifurcation in a Vlasov equation (arXiv:2212.01250)
comment: 3 pages, 4 figures, Comment on the paper: arXiv:2212.01250
summary: We comment on the recent work by Yamaguchi and Barré [Phys. Rev. E 107, 054203 (2023)], which uses linear stability analysis of the Vlasov equation to characterize phase transitions in a generalized Hamiltonian Mean Field (gHMF) model. By performing extensive molecular dynamics simulations with $N=10^8$ particles, we demonstrate that the bifurcation analysis of the initial stationary distribution is insufficient to predict either the location or the nature of the phase transition to a quasi-stationary state (qSS). Specifically, we show that for bimodal momentum distributions, the instability threshold identified by the authors does not correspond to a ferromagnetic transition; instead, the system remains in a paramagnetic state characterized by magnetization oscillations with a zero time-average. We find that the true paramagnetic-ferromagnetic transition is discontinuous (first-order) and occurs at significantly larger coupling strengths, characterized by a clear coexistence of states. These results indicate that linear bifurcation and symmetry-breaking phase transitions are distinct phenomena in long-range interacting systems, and that the former lacks the predictive power to describe the long-time fate of the system.

AI.tldr: 该论文评论了Yamaguchi和Barré的工作，指出线性稳定性分析不足以预测广义哈密顿平均场模型中的相变，通过大规模分子动力学模拟揭示了真正的相变是一级不连续的。
AI.motivation: 针对Yamaguchi和Barré使用Vlasov方程线性稳定性分析来表征广义哈密顿平均场模型相变的工作，作者认为这种方法不足以准确预测相变的位置和性质，需要进行验证。
AI.method: 使用大规模分子动力学模拟，包含N=10^8个粒子，对广义哈密顿平均场模型进行数值研究，特别关注双峰动量分布情况下的相变行为。
AI.result: 发现原论文中的不稳定性阈值并不对应铁磁相变，系统实际上保持在顺磁态；真正的顺磁-铁磁相变是一级不连续的，发生在更大的耦合强度下，并表现出明显的状态共存现象。
AI.conclusion: 线性分岔和对称性破缺相变在长程相互作用系统中是不同的现象，线性分岔分析缺乏预测系统长期命运的能力，需要更全面的非线性分析方法。

title: Molecular dynamics simulation of high slip flow of water confined between graphene nanochannels at experimentally accessible strain rates
summary: The transient time correlation function method (TTCF) has emerged as a powerful methodology for accurately probing systems at low shear rates. In the present study, TTCF was used to evaluate the shear rate dependence of the slip length in a high-slip system consisting of water confined between graphene walls at experimentally accessible shear rates, for which classical nonequilibrium molecular dynamics (NEMD) is unfeasible. The corresponding Navier friction coefficient was computed for all shear rates spanning six orders of magnitude and compared with the equilibrium limit. We report for the first time NEMD results obtained at experimentally accessible shear rates using the TTCF approach for a system that has attracted significant interest over the past decades. The slip length calculated with TTCF is in good agreement with previous equilibrium molecular dynamics simulations and experiments. Our aim here is to highlight the extraordinary power of TTCF, particularly for high-slip (low strain-rate) systems, and to verify that equilibrium methods directly match NEMD measurements at experimentally accessible strain rates.

AI.tldr: TTCF方法用于研究石墨烯壁间水的高滑移系统，在实验可及的低剪切速率下计算滑移长度，验证了平衡方法与NEMD结果的一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统非平衡分子动力学(NEMD)无法在实验可及的低剪切速率下研究高滑移系统，需要开发新方法来准确计算低剪切速率下的滑移长度和摩擦系数。
AI.method: 采用瞬态时间相关函数方法(TTCF)研究石墨烯壁间水的高滑移系统，计算了跨越六个数量级的剪切速率下的滑移长度和Navier摩擦系数。
AI.result: TTCF计算的滑移长度与先前平衡分子动力学模拟和实验结果吻合良好，首次在实验可及剪切速率下获得了NEMD结果，验证了平衡方法与NEMD测量的一致性。
AI.conclusion: TTCF方法特别适用于高滑移（低应变率）系统，具有强大的计算能力，能够准确研究传统NEMD方法无法处理的低剪切速率问题。

title: Chiral Spin Liquid in Rydberg Atom Arrays
summary: Despite long-standing theoretical interest, the chiral spin liquid, a topologically ordered phase, has yet to be observed experimentally. Here we surprisingly find its emergence in an experimentally realized dipolar $\text{XY}$ model when Rydberg atoms are arranged in a breathing kagome lattice. Using the infinite density matrix renormalization group, we numerically calculate the ground state's chiral order parameter, spin-spin correlations, Chern number, and entanglement spectrum. Our numerical results provide strong evidence for the chiral spin liquid phase. Furthermore, we identify a quantum phase transition from a Dirac spin liquid to a chiral spin liquid as the lattice geometry is tuned from the isotropic kagome to the breathing kagome lattice.

AI.tldr: 在呼吸笼目晶格中通过偶极XY模型实验实现了手性自旋液体相，并发现从狄拉克自旋液体到手性自旋液体的量子相变
AI.motivation: 手性自旋液体作为一种拓扑有序相，长期受到理论关注但一直未能在实验中观测到。本文旨在通过实验实现的偶极XY模型在呼吸笼目晶格中寻找这种相。
AI.method: 使用无限密度矩阵重整化群方法，数值计算基态的手性序参数、自旋-自旋关联、陈数和纠缠谱，分析呼吸笼目晶格中Rydberg原子的偶极XY模型。
AI.result: 数值结果为手性自旋液体相提供了强有力证据，并识别出从各向同性笼目晶格到呼吸笼目晶格调谐过程中，从狄拉克自旋液体到手性自旋液体的量子相变。
AI.conclusion: 在实验实现的呼吸笼目晶格偶极XY模型中成功观测到手性自旋液体相，为长期理论预测的拓扑相提供了首个实验证据，并揭示了新的量子相变路径。

title: From Photons to Electrons: Accelerated Materials Discovery via Random Libraries and Automated Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy
summary: The real-world implementation of materials prediction algorithms remains limited by persistent characterization bottlenecks in materials discovery, where photon-based probe techniques (e.g., XRD or Raman) impose long acquisition times and access latencies, restricting exploration to quasi-ternary composition spaces typically realized as compositional libraries. Here, we argue that a paradigm shift from photon- to electron-based characterization can realign materials characterization with modern high-throughput synthesis. We formulate cost functions and exploration strategies for STEM-based chemical and structural characterization and use Monte Carlo simulations to show that random chemical libraries, where compositionally distinct regions are co-located within a single specimen and interrogated in situ by electron spectroscopies, can sample high-dimensional composition and phase spaces with orders-of-magnitude greater effective coverage than conventional spread-library/X-ray approaches. We further demonstrate autonomous discovery on a laboratory STEM platform, where ML-based autotuning and scripted control enable iterative region selection and characterization without human intervention. Finally, we outline extensions to labeled or position-encoded libraries that preserve compositional and processing metadata, enabling joint exploration of composition and process spaces. Together, these results establish electron-based, ML-enabled STEM as a scalable pathway toward combinatorially rich materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出从光子基表征转向电子基表征的范式转变，利用STEM电子显微镜和机器学习实现高通量材料发现，能比传统X射线方法更高效地探索高维成分空间。
AI.motivation: 当前材料预测算法受限于光子基表征技术（如XRD或拉曼）的长采集时间和访问延迟，限制了材料发现只能探索准三元成分空间，无法跟上现代高通量合成技术的发展。
AI.method: 提出从光子基转向电子基表征的范式转变，制定STEM化学和结构表征的成本函数和探索策略，使用蒙特卡洛模拟验证随机化学库方法，并在实验室STEM平台上实现基于机器学习的自主发现系统。
AI.result: 随机化学库方法比传统扩散库/X射线方法能实现数量级更高的有效覆盖度，自主STEM平台能实现无需人工干预的迭代区域选择和表征，为组合丰富的材料发现提供了可扩展途径。
AI.conclusion: 电子基、机器学习赋能的STEM技术为组合丰富的材料发现建立了可扩展路径，通过保留成分和处理元数据的标记或位置编码库，能够实现成分和工艺空间的联合探索。

title: Joule heating and electronic Gurzhi effect in hydrodynamic differential transport in an electron liquid
summary: We perform a differential resistance study in the hydrodynamic regime of electron liquid in GaAs/AlGaAs quantum wells. At zero magnetic field ($B$) a Lorentzian profile occurs in the nonlinear transport driven by a U-turn (ac) current loop, in (ac + dc) measurements a minimum deepens with the external dc current bias ($j_{dc}$). Our analysis shows that the observed electronic transport valley induced by $j_{dc}$ is attributed to Joule heating effect on the electron temperature ($T_{e}$) of electron liquid. Quantitatively, we demonstrate that the viscosity resistivity ($Δρ$) is proportional to $T^{-2}$ and is consistent with the dc-current induced electronic Gurzhi effect in various configurations of measurement.

AI.tldr: 在GaAs/AlGaAs量子阱中研究电子液体的流体动力学输运，发现直流电流偏置通过焦耳加热效应改变电子温度，导致电阻谷现象，证实了电子Gurzhi效应。
AI.motivation: 研究电子液体在流体动力学区域中的非线性输运特性，特别是直流电流偏置对电子温度的影响，以及由此产生的电子Gurzhi效应。
AI.method: 在GaAs/AlGaAs量子阱中进行微分电阻研究，采用U型交流电流回路驱动非线性输运，结合交流+直流测量，分析直流电流偏置对电子温度的影响。
AI.result: 零磁场下观察到洛伦兹型非线性输运曲线，直流电流偏置加深电阻谷；分析表明该现象源于焦耳加热效应改变电子温度，粘度电阻率与T^{-2}成正比，与电子Gurzhi效应一致。
AI.conclusion: 直流电流偏置通过焦耳加热效应改变电子温度，导致电子液体粘度电阻率变化，实验证实了电子Gurzhi效应在多种测量配置中的存在。

title: Disentangling Anomalous Hall Effect Mechanisms and Extra Symmetry Protection in Altermagnetic Systems
summary: We investigate the evolution of Anomalous Hall Conductivity (AHC) in a coplanar and collinear antiferromagnetic system with varying spin canting angles. A tight-binding model based on three t2g-orbitals in a body-centered tetragonal lattice is constructed, where the inclusion of third-nearest neighbor hopping is demonstrated to be essential for capturing the characteristic energy band splitting of altermagnetic materials. By employing a symmetry analysis based on spin space groups and treating spin-orbit coupling (SOC) as a perturbation, we theoretically distinguish and numerically verify two origins of the transverse transport: the conventional anomalous Hall effect (AHE) induced by net magnetization and the Crystal Hall Effect (CHE) arising from specific crystal symmetries. Our results show that the conductivity components driven by these two mechanisms follow distinct trigonometric dependencies on the canting angle. Crucially, we identify a hidden C110 rotational symmetry that has been previously overlooked in static magnetic group analyses. By expanding the AHC in terms of spin orientation vectors, we demonstrate that this symmetry acts as a bridge connecting distinct magnetic configurations with different canting angles, thereby strictly protecting the equivalence of orthogonal conductivity components in the collinear system.

AI.tldr: 研究反铁磁系统中自旋倾斜角变化对反常霍尔电导的影响，区分了传统AHE和晶体霍尔效应，发现隐藏的C110旋转对称性保护了正交电导分量的等价性。
AI.motivation: 研究共面共线反铁磁系统中自旋倾斜角变化对反常霍尔电导的影响，区分传统反常霍尔效应和晶体霍尔效应的不同起源，探索对称性在横向输运中的作用。
AI.method: 基于体心四方晶格中三个t2g轨道构建紧束缚模型，包含第三近邻跃迁；采用基于自旋空间群的对称性分析，将自旋轨道耦合作为微扰处理；通过自旋取向矢量展开反常霍尔电导。
AI.result: 发现两种机制驱动的电导分量随倾斜角呈现不同的三角函数依赖关系；识别出静态磁群分析中被忽视的隐藏C110旋转对称性，该对称性连接不同倾斜角的磁构型，严格保护共线系统中正交电导分量的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 通过对称性分析成功区分了传统AHE和晶体霍尔效应，揭示了隐藏对称性在保护横向输运性质中的关键作用，为理解反铁磁系统中的霍尔效应提供了新视角。

title: Feedback percolation on complex networks
summary: Traditional percolation theory assumes static microscopic rules, limiting its ability to describe real-world complex systems where macroscopic order actively regulates local interactions. Here, we introduce feedback percolation, an unified framework that dynamically couples the microscopic activation probability to the macroscopic size of the giant component. We show that this simple feedback mechanism produces a rich variety of behaviors both analytically and numerically. Depending on the feedback functions, the system exhibits explosive discontinuous jumps, hybrid transitions, limit-cycle oscillations, and routes to chaos, absent in classical percolation. Our findings establish that macroscopic feedback provides a unifying physical mechanism for phenomena ranging from self-regulating oscillations to systemic infrastructure collapse.

AI.tldr: 提出反馈渗流框架，将微观激活概率与宏观巨分量大小动态耦合，产生爆炸性跃变、混合相变、极限环振荡和混沌等丰富行为
AI.motivation: 传统渗流理论假设静态微观规则，无法描述现实复杂系统中宏观秩序主动调节局部相互作用的现象
AI.method: 引入反馈渗流统一框架，将微观激活概率动态耦合到宏观巨分量大小，分析不同反馈函数下的系统行为
AI.result: 系统展现出爆炸性不连续跃变、混合相变、极限环振荡和通向混沌的路径等丰富行为，这些在经典渗流中不存在
AI.conclusion: 宏观反馈为从自调节振荡到系统性基础设施崩溃等现象提供了统一的物理机制

title: Suiren-1.0 Technical Report: A Family of Molecular Foundation Models
summary: We introduce Suiren-1.0, a family of molecular foundation models for the accurate modeling of diverse organic systems. Suiren-1.0 comprising three specialized variants (Suiren-Base, Suiren-Dimer, and Suiren-ConfAvg) is integrated within an algorithmic framework that bridges the gap between 3D conformational geometry and 2D statistical ensemble spaces. We first pre-train Suiren-Base (1.8B parameters) on a 70M-sample Density Functional Theory dataset using spatial self-supervision and SE(3)-equivariant architectures, achieving robust performance in quantum property prediction. Suiren-Dimer extends this capability through continued pre-training on 13.5M intermolecular interaction samples. To enable efficient downstream application, we propose Conformation Compression Distillation (CCD), a diffusion-based framework that distills complex 3D structural representations into 2D conformation-averaged representations. This yields the lightweight Suiren-ConfAvg, which generates high-fidelity representations from SMILES or molecular graphs. Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that Suiren-1.0 establishes state-of-the-art results across a range of tasks. All models and benchmarks are open-sourced.

AI.tldr: Suiren-1.0是一个分子基础模型家族，包含三个变体，通过3D构象几何与2D统计集成空间的算法框架，实现有机系统的准确建模。
AI.motivation: 解决有机分子系统建模中3D构象几何与2D统计集成空间之间的鸿沟，提供准确且高效的分子表示方法。
AI.method: 1. 预训练Suiren-Base（18亿参数）在7000万样本DFT数据集上，使用空间自监督和SE(3)-等变架构；2. Suiren-Dimer在1350万分子间相互作用样本上继续预训练；3. 提出构象压缩蒸馏（CCD）框架，将复杂3D结构表示蒸馏为2D构象平均表示，得到轻量级Suiren-ConfAvg。
AI.result: Suiren-1.0在多种任务上取得了最先进的结果，能够从SMILES或分子图生成高保真表示，所有模型和基准测试均已开源。
AI.conclusion: Suiren-1.0模型家族通过创新的算法框架，成功实现了有机分子系统的准确建模，在量子性质预测和分子表示学习方面表现出色，为分子科学提供了强大的基础模型工具。

title: High Entropy Alloy under Shock Compression: Optical-Pump X-Ray-Probe
summary: High entropy alloys (HEAs) are multi-principal-element alloys designed for tailorable mechanical performance and have been attracting significant engineering interest, yet their fundamental behaviour under extreme dynamic conditions, such as shock loading, remains unexplored. Here, we report laser-shock experiments on two different types of 1-micrometers-thick HEA microfilms, CuPdAgPtAu and CrFeCoNiCuMo, on 25-micrometers-thick black-Kapton ablator driven by a high intensity laser pulse (532 nm, 5 ns, 16 J, 0.5-mm diameter focal spot) and probed by an X-ray free electron laser (XFEL) pulse (12 keV, 7 fs). Time-resolved X-ray diffraction (XRD) shows the formation of a transient phase with a lattice compression up to 5.1% of the CuPdAgPtAu HEA along the (111) plane; this transient compressed phase existed for 0.3 ns. The impedance matching Hugoniot analysis estimated a shock pressure of 55 +/- 6 GPa in the HEA film, while Au- and Fe-based equations of state (EoS) modelling predict 80 GPa (0.8 MBar) at the free HEA surface. The free HEA surface reached maximum velocities of ~ 5 km/s as recorded from in situ monitoring with the velocity interferometry system for any reflector (VISAR) imaging. These initial HEA results show the suitability of HEA sample preparation and XFEL-based XRD characterisation under extreme shock loading, and are promising for experimental determination of the EoS of this emerging class of materials (beamtime proposal No.: 2024A8503 for a 6-hour preliminary experiment).

AI.tldr: 该研究首次通过激光冲击实验和X射线自由电子激光衍射技术，探索了两种高熵合金在极端动态条件下的瞬态相变行为，观测到高达5.1%的晶格压缩和0.3纳秒的瞬态相存在。
AI.motivation: 高熵合金因其可定制的机械性能而备受工程关注，但其在极端动态条件（如冲击加载）下的基本行为尚未被探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白，为这类新兴材料的本构方程实验测定奠定基础。
AI.method: 采用激光冲击实验：使用高强度激光脉冲（532 nm，5 ns，16 J）驱动25微米厚的黑色Kapton烧蚀层，对1微米厚的CuPdAgPtAu和CrFeCoNiCuMo高熵合金微膜进行冲击加载。通过X射线自由电子激光脉冲（12 keV，7 fs）进行时间分辨X射线衍射探测，同时使用VISAR成像系统原位监测自由表面速度。
AI.result: 1. 在CuPdAgPtAu高熵合金中观测到沿(111)晶面高达5.1%的晶格压缩瞬态相，该相存在时间约0.3纳秒；2. 阻抗匹配Hugoniot分析估计冲击压力为55±6 GPa；3. 基于Au和Fe的状态方程模型预测自由表面压力达80 GPa（0.8 MBar）；4. VISAR记录显示自由表面最大速度达~5 km/s。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功验证了高熵合金样品制备和XFEL-XRD表征技术在极端冲击加载条件下的适用性，为未来系统测定这类新兴材料的状态方程提供了有前景的实验方法（初步实验提案编号：2024A8503）。

title: Observation of microscopic domain effects in the metal-insulator transition of thin-film NdNiO$_3$
summary: Perovskite oxides display correlated electrical, magnetic, and thermal properties that can be further tuned in the thin-film limit, making them contenders for next-generation electronics. Measuring thermal transport in thin films is challenging, because traditional techniques are dominated by the substrate. Here, frequency-domain thermoreflectance (FDTR) of an epitaxial NdNiO$_3$ thin film reveals a sharp change in out-of-plane thermal conductivity across the metal-insulator transition. Complementary frequency-domain photoreflectance (FDPR) reveals a large change in ambipolar diffusivity of photoexcited carriers. While the in-plane electrical resistance shows large hysteresis, out-of-plane thermal and charge transport shows negligible hysteresis. We attribute this discrepancy to anisotropy in the percolation of nanoscale domains across the transition as the film thickness approaches the domain length scale. We establish FDTR and FDPR as sensitive probes of quantum material phase transitions and highlight NdNiO$_3$ for thermal control and memory applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用频域热反射和频域光反射技术测量NdNiO₃薄膜的金属-绝缘体相变，发现面外热导率和载流子扩散率在相变点发生显著变化，但无滞后现象，与面内电阻的大滞后形成对比。
AI.motivation: 钙钛矿氧化物薄膜具有可调控的电、磁、热性质，但在薄膜中测量热输运面临挑战，传统技术受基底主导。需要开发新方法来研究薄膜中的热输运特性及其相变行为。
AI.method: 使用频域热反射(FDTR)测量NdNiO₃外延薄膜的面外热导率，同时使用频域光反射(FDPR)测量光激发载流子的双极扩散率，并与面内电阻测量结果进行对比分析。
AI.result: 发现面外热导率和载流子扩散率在金属-绝缘体相变点发生急剧变化，但无滞后现象；而面内电阻显示出大滞后。这种差异归因于薄膜厚度接近畴尺寸时，纳米尺度畴的各向异性渗透行为。
AI.conclusion: FDTR和FDPR是探测量子材料相变的灵敏工具，NdNiO₃在热控制和存储器应用方面具有潜力，薄膜厚度与畴尺寸的接近导致了输运性质的各向异性行为。

title: A Unified Heterogeneous Implementation of Numerical Atomic Orbitals-Based Real-Time TDDFT within the ABACUS Package
summary: We present a unified heterogeneous computing framework for real-time time-dependent density functional theory (RT-TDDFT) based on numerical atomic orbitals (NAOs), implemented in the ABACUS package. We introduce three co-designed abstraction layers, including unified data containers, unified linear algebra operators, and unified grid integration interfaces. These layers collectively accelerate the two most demanding parts of NAO-based RT-TDDFT: explicit real-time wavefunction propagation and real-space grid operations such as Hamiltonian construction and force evaluation under external fields. We validate the method by computing optical properties for systems ranging from finite molecules to periodic solids, showing excellent agreement with standard benchmarks. Performance evaluations on bulk silicon demonstrate that a single GPU can achieve substantial wall-clock speedup over a fully utilized dual-socket CPU node. Furthermore, distributed multi-GPU strong-scaling tests confirm high parallel efficiency over tens of GPUs. This work establishes a high-performance, portable platform for large-scale first-principles simulations of ultrafast electron dynamics.

AI.tldr: ABACUS包中基于数值原子轨道实现统一异构计算框架，用于实时含时密度泛函理论计算，通过三层抽象设计加速波函数传播和哈密顿量构建，在GPU上实现显著加速。
AI.motivation: 实时含时密度泛函理论(RT-TDDFT)在模拟超快电子动力学方面很重要，但计算成本高。基于数值原子轨道(NAO)的方法需要高效处理波函数传播和实空间网格操作，特别是在异构计算架构上。
AI.method: 提出三层协同设计的抽象层：统一数据容器、统一线性代数算子和统一网格积分接口。这些层共同加速NAO基RT-TDDFT中最耗时的部分：显式实时波函数传播以及哈密顿量构建和力评估等实空间网格操作。
AI.result: 验证了从有限分子到周期性固体的光学性质计算，与标准基准测试结果一致。性能评估显示单个GPU相比完全利用的双CPU节点实现显著加速，分布式多GPU强扩展测试在数十个GPU上保持高并行效率。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为大规模第一性原理超快电子动力学模拟建立了一个高性能、可移植的平台，通过统一的异构计算框架实现了RT-TDDFT计算的高效加速。

title: Dissipative free fermions in disguise
summary: Recently, a class of spin chains known as ``free fermions in disguise'' (FFD) has been discovered, which possess hidden free-fermion spectra even though they are not solvable via the standard Jordan-Wigner transformation. In this work, we extend this FFD framework to open quantum systems governed by the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) equation. We establish a general class of exactly solvable open quantum systems within the FFD framework: if the Liouvillian frustration graph is claw-free and has a simplicial clique, the Liouvillian possesses a hidden free-fermion spectrum. In particular, the (even-hole, claw)-free condition automatically guarantees this, enabling exact computation of the Liouvillian gap and an infinite-temperature autocorrelation function. Our results provide the first realization of the FFD mechanism in open quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 将"伪装自由费米子"框架扩展到开放量子系统，建立了一类精确可解的开放量子系统，条件是刘维尔算符的挫折图是无爪且具有单纯团，从而可以精确计算刘维尔能隙和无限温度自相关函数。
AI.motivation: 最近发现的"伪装自由费米子"自旋链具有隐藏的自由费米子谱，但无法通过标准Jordan-Wigner变换求解。本研究旨在将这一框架扩展到由GKSL方程描述的开放量子系统，探索在开放系统中实现FFD机制的可能性。
AI.method: 将FFD框架扩展到开放量子系统，建立一般类别的精确可解开放系统。关键条件是：如果刘维尔算符的挫折图是无爪的且具有单纯团，则刘维尔算符具有隐藏的自由费米子谱。特别是，(偶洞，无爪)条件自动保证这一点。
AI.result: 成功实现了开放量子系统中FFD机制的首个实例。在满足条件的系统中，可以精确计算刘维尔能隙和无限温度自相关函数，为开放量子系统的精确求解提供了新途径。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次在开放量子系统中实现了FFD机制，建立了一类精确可解的开放系统框架，为开放量子系统的理论研究提供了新的精确求解工具。

title: Overcoming sampling limitations using machine-learned interatomic potentials: the case of water-in-salt electrolytes
summary: Machine-learned interatomic potentials hold the promise to enable the modeling of highly concentrated liquids over meaningful timescales, far from reach for current ab initio electronic structure methods. Here we evaluate the performances of various MACE potentials in modeling a $21 m$ water-in-salt electrolyte based on lithium bis(trifluoromethanesulfonyl)imide. We test out-of-the-box foundation models, as well as both fine tuning and from scratch training strategies. Our simulations demonstrate that surrogate models allow to overcome sampling limitations of ab initio molecular dynamics, reaching an excellent agreement with experimental observables such as the structure factor. We also demonstrate the benefit of fine tuning a foundation model over training from scratch: in terms of data efficiency, but most importantly as a means to provide information regarding configurations hard to sample, such as short Li$^+$--Li$^+$ distances. Finally, we show that depending on the reference exchange-correlation functional, empirical dispersion correction schemes can be detrimental. All in all, our work shows that machine-learned interatomic potentials are a good fit for the modeling of highly concentrated electrolytes over long timescales.

AI.tldr: 评估多种MACE势能模型在21m水盐电解质中的性能，比较预训练模型、微调和从头训练策略，证明机器学习势能可克服第一性原理采样的限制，并展示微调在数据效率和难采样配置方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 机器学习势能有望模拟高浓度液体在长时间尺度上的行为，这超出了当前第一性原理电子结构方法的能力范围。需要评估不同机器学习势能模型在高浓度水盐电解质中的性能。
AI.method: 使用基于锂双(三氟甲磺酰)亚胺的21m水盐电解质作为测试体系，评估多种MACE势能模型。测试开箱即用的基础模型，以及微调和从头训练两种策略。通过分子动力学模拟比较不同模型的性能。
AI.result: 代理模型能够克服第一性原理分子动力学的采样限制，与实验观测如结构因子达到良好一致。微调基础模型相比从头训练具有数据效率优势，并能提供难采样配置（如短Li⁺-Li⁺距离）的信息。经验色散校正方案的效果取决于参考交换相关泛函的选择。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习势能非常适合长时间尺度下高浓度电解质的建模，微调策略在数据效率和难采样配置方面具有明显优势。

title: Green parafermions as emergent flat-band excitations in condensed matter
summary: Green parafermions, originally introduced by Green and extended by Greenberg and Messiah through trilinear and relative trilinear commutation relations beyond Bose-Fermi statistics, are generally regarded as mathematical curiosities without physical realization. We show that these paraparticles can in fact emerge as composite excitations in a broad class of condensed-matter systems undergoing spontaneous symmetry breaking with type-B Goldstone modes. The key ingredient is the introduction of auxiliary Majorana fermions defined on emergent unit cells produced by partial translational-symmetry breaking. When the auxiliary Majoranas are treated as physical degrees of freedom, the resulting Green parafermion states (up to a projection operator) correspond to flat-band excitations, whose creation and annihilation operators satisfy the trilinear algebra. When they are regarded as fictitious, the same construction explains the appearance of exponentially many degenerate ground states and reveals a surprising correspondence between Green parafermions and self-similar geometric objects, such as the golden spiral. Explicit realizations are demonstrated for the ferromagnetic spin-1 biquadratic model and the ferromagnetic $\rm {SU}(2)$ flat-band Tasaki model, showing that condensed-matter systems with type-B Goldstone modes provide a natural setting for Green parafermions as emergent, possibly observable quasiparticles.

AI.tldr: 本文证明Green parafermions（绿色仲费米子）可以在具有B型Goldstone模的凝聚态系统中作为复合激发出现，而非仅仅是数学奇点。
AI.motivation: Green parafermions长期以来被视为没有物理实现的数学奇点。本文旨在证明这些仲粒子实际上可以在凝聚态系统中作为可观测的准粒子出现。
AI.method: 通过引入由部分平移对称性破缺产生的涌现元胞上的辅助Majorana费米子。当这些辅助Majorana被视为物理自由度时，得到的Green parafermion态（通过投影算符）对应平带激发；当被视为虚构时，该构造解释了指数级简并基态的出现。
AI.result: 在铁磁自旋1双二次模型和铁磁SU(2)平带Tasaki模型中实现了具体实例，表明具有B型Goldstone模的凝聚态系统为Green parafermions作为涌现准粒子提供了自然平台。
AI.conclusion: Green parafermions可以在凝聚态系统中作为复合激发出现，揭示了它们与自相似几何对象（如黄金螺旋）的对应关系，为这些长期被视为数学奇点的仲粒子提供了物理实现途径。

title: Unlocking Static Polarization and Strain Density Waves in Perovskites by Softening a Hidden Antiferrodistortive Tilt Gradient Mode
summary: Spin density waves (SDWs) represent a fundamental paradigm of spatially modulated order in condensed matter systems, yet their electrical and mechanical analogues polarization and strain density waves (PDWs and StDWs) have remained elusive as equilibrium phases. Here, we introduce a general, symmetry-driven strategy to unlock static PDWs and StDWs in perovskites SrTiO3 and SrMnO3. Using first-principles calculations, we uncover a previously overlooked soft antiferrodistortive tilt gradient mode at small-q wavevector in the phonon dispersion of their presumed Ima2 ground state under moderate tensile strain. Group-theory analysis reveals that a hard polaracoustic phonon, which intrinsically carries PDWs and StDWs, is improperly destabilized by a trilinear coupling with this modulated tilt mode and an inherently uniform tilt mode. This interaction drives a structural transition from the Ima2 phase to a novel lower-energy Pmn21 phase that hosts long-range-ordered PDWs and StDWs. Strikingly, the engineered StDWs in SrMnO3 activate an electrically tunable SDW via the flexomagnetic effect. These discoveries fundamentally revise the strain-phase diagrams of prototypical perovskites and establish a unified phonon-engineering framework that links modulated phonon instabilities to targeted density-wave order, offering new pathways for designing advanced electromechanical and magnetoelectric functionalities.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现了一种在SrTiO3和SrMnO3钙钛矿中实现静态极化密度波(PDW)和应变密度波(StDW)的对称性驱动策略，通过声子工程将调制声子不稳定性与目标密度波序联系起来。
AI.motivation: 极化密度波(PDW)和应变密度波(StDW)作为与自旋密度波(SDW)类似的基本空间调制序，在平衡相中一直难以实现，需要开发新的策略来解锁这些相。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，结合群论分析，发现在Ima2基态下存在一个软的反铁畸变倾斜梯度模式，该模式与硬极性声学声子通过三线性耦合相互作用，驱动结构相变到Pmn21相。
AI.result: 在SrTiO3和SrMnO3中成功实现了长程有序的PDW和StDW，特别在SrMnO3中，工程化的StDW通过挠曲磁效应激活了电可调谐的SDW。
AI.conclusion: 该研究从根本上修正了典型钙钛矿的应变相图，建立了一个统一的声子工程框架，将调制声子不稳定性与目标密度波序联系起来，为设计先进的机电和磁电功能提供了新途径。

title: A closed-loop platform for the design and nanoscale imaging of GHz acoustic metamaterials
summary: Band structure engineering in surface acoustic wave (SAW) metamaterials could advance both classical telecommunications and quantum information processing. However, no imaging technique has demonstrated the necessary capability to resolve sub-$μ$m traveling SAWs across wide GHz bandwidths. Existing methods capture only fragments of the dispersion at discrete frequencies, preventing systematic characterization and control of SAW-based metamaterials. Here, we develop electrostatic force microscopy (EFM) to enable real-space imaging of traveling SAWs in honeycomb metamaterials on LiNbO$_3$. Our application leverages sub-200 nm spatial resolution, broad GHz bandwidth, and non-contact imaging to map complex band structures with continuous frequency resolution and expanded frequency range, while preserving sub-lattice detail. Using EFM, we map the full relevant frequency range around the Dirac point of a SAW graphene analog, including the acoustic Dirac cones, and the transition from ballistic to diffusive SAW transport regime. Furthermore, by breaking sublattice symmetry, we tune the opening of a band gap at the Dirac point, and image frequency-dependent wave localization on sublattice sites. Our EFM technique closes the loop between design and real-space validation, streamlining the engineering of arbitrary SAW landscapes for next-generation applications spanning telecommunications, microfluidics, and quantum acoustics.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了静电力显微镜技术，实现了对表面声波在GHz频段、亚微米尺度的实时空间成像，成功绘制了类石墨烯声子晶体中的狄拉克锥和能带结构。
AI.motivation: 现有成像技术无法在GHz宽频带范围内解析亚微米尺度的行波表面声波，只能捕获离散频率下的片段信息，这阻碍了对表面声波超材料的系统表征和控制。
AI.method: 开发了静电力显微镜技术，利用亚200纳米空间分辨率、宽GHz带宽和非接触成像能力，在铌酸锂衬底上的蜂窝状超材料中实现行波表面声波的实时空间成像。
AI.result: 成功绘制了表面声波类石墨烯类似物狄拉克点周围的全频段能带结构，包括声学狄拉克锥，以及从弹道到扩散传输机制的转变。通过打破亚晶格对称性，实现了狄拉克点能隙的调控，并成像了频率依赖的波局域化现象。
AI.conclusion: 该静电力显微镜技术填补了设计与真实空间验证之间的空白，为下一代通信、微流体和量子声学应用中的任意表面声波景观工程提供了高效工具。

title: Tangent equations of motion for nonlinear response functions
summary: Nonlinear response functions, formulated as multipoint correlation functions or Volterra kernels, encode the dynamical and spectroscopic properties of physical systems and underpin a wide range of nonlinear transport and optical phenomena. However, their evaluation rapidly becomes prohibitive at high orders because of combinatorial (often factorial) scaling or severe numerical errors. Here, we establish a systematic and efficient framework to compute nonlinear response functions directly from real-time dynamics, without explicitly constructing multipoint correlators or relying on numerically unstable finite-difference methods for order-resolved extraction. Our approach is based on the Gateaux derivative with respect to the external field in function space, which yields a closed hierarchy of tangent equations of motion (TEOM). Propagating the TEOM alongside the original dynamics isolates each perturbative order with high accuracy, providing a term-by-term decomposition of physical contributions. The computational cost scales exponentially with response order in the fully general setting and reduces to polynomial complexity when all perturbation directions are identical; both regimes avoid the factorial scaling of explicit multipoint-correlator evaluations. We demonstrate the power of TEOM by computing frequency-resolved fifth-order response functions for a solid-state electron model and by obtaining nonlinear response functions up to the 49th order with controlled accuracy in a classical Duffing oscillator. We further show that our time-evolution formulation allows optical conductivities to be evaluated directly while remaining numerically stable even near zero frequency. TEOM can be incorporated seamlessly into existing real-time evolution methods, yielding a general framework for computing nonlinear response functions in quantum and classical dynamical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Gateaux导数的切线方程运动(TEOM)框架，直接计算非线性响应函数，避免组合爆炸和数值不稳定问题
AI.motivation: 非线性响应函数在物理系统中至关重要，但传统计算方法面临组合爆炸（阶乘增长）和数值不稳定的严重挑战
AI.method: 基于Gateaux导数在函数空间中对场进行求导，建立切线方程运动(TEOM)的封闭层次结构，与原始动力学并行传播以隔离各阶扰动
AI.result: 成功计算固态电子模型的五阶频率分辨响应函数，以及经典Duffing振子高达49阶的非线性响应函数，保持数值稳定性
AI.conclusion: TEOM框架提供了一种高效、稳定且可扩展的计算非线性响应函数的方法，可无缝集成到现有实时演化方法中

title: Stable, Fast, and Accurate Kohn-Sham Inversion in Gaussian Basis for Open Shell Molecular and Condensed Phase Systems via Density Matrix Penalization
summary: Here we present a density matrix based KS inversion method formulated entirely within a Gaussian basis representation to optimize a KS potential matrix that reproduces a target electron density. Inverse Kohn-Sham (KS) density functional theory (DFT) aims to determine the effective local KS potential that reproduces a target electron density, and is important both for electronic structure analysis and for the development of orbital based correction methods. In finite Gaussian basis implementations, however, conventional inverse KS-DFT approaches such as the Zhao-Morrison-Parr (ZMP) method often become poorly constrained and inefficient, because the real space penalty potential is projected onto a limited number of Gaussian basis matrix elements, which can strongly coarse-grain its spatial variation. In the present method, the density matrix mismatch is defined in a Lowdin orthogonalized basis, which yields a penalty energy invariant under unitary rotations in that basis. The corresponding penalty potential contribution to the KS Hamiltonian is derived analytically in the original nonorthogonal Gaussian basis. Across a wide range of penalty strengths, the self consistent field (SCF) optimization remains robust and efficient for various open shell systems, while progressively tightening the penalty drives the electron density into accurate agreement with the target. Benchmarks on molecules and condensed phase systems show that the method achieves substantially smaller attainable density deviations than the conventional ZMP method. The method provides a fast and accurate route to KS inversion in finite Gaussian basis sets and may also be useful for future orbital based correction schemes.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于密度矩阵的高斯基组KS反演方法，通过优化KS势矩阵来重现目标电子密度，相比传统ZMP方法更高效准确。
AI.motivation: 传统逆KS-DFT方法（如ZMP）在高斯基组实现中效率低下且约束性差，因为实空间惩罚势投影到有限高斯基矩阵元上会严重粗化其空间变化，需要更稳健高效的方法。
AI.method: 在Löwdin正交化基中定义密度矩阵失配，得到在该基下对幺正旋转不变的惩罚能量，然后在原始非正交高斯基中解析推导惩罚势对KS哈密顿量的贡献。
AI.result: 方法在宽范围惩罚强度下对开壳层系统保持稳健高效，逐步收紧惩罚能使电子密度与目标精确匹配，在分子和凝聚相系统中比传统ZMP方法获得更小的密度偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为有限高斯基组中的KS反演提供了快速准确途径，也可用于未来基于轨道的修正方案。

title: Symmetry group factorization and unitary equivalence among Temperley-Lieb integrable models
summary: It is shown that there is a hidden connection between the two well-studied sequences of the Temperley-Lieb (TL) integrable models -- the $q$-state quantum Potts (QP) models at the self-dual points and the staggered ${\rm SU}(n)$ spin-$s$ chains with $n=2s+1$ ($s \ge 1$), in addition to the uniform ${\rm SU}(2)$ spin-$1/2$ Heisenberg model. For each sequence, symmetry group factorization arises, in the sense that if $q$ is factorized into $q_1$ and $q_2$, then the $q$-state QP model is unitarily equivalent to a combined QP model with the symmetry group ${\rm S}_{q_1} \times {\rm S}_{q_2}$ or if $n$ is factorized into $n_1$ and $n_2$, then the staggered ${\rm SU}(n)$ spin-$s$ chain with the symmetry group ${\rm SU}(n)$ is unitarily equivalent to a combined staggered ${\rm SU}(n_1) \times {\rm SU}(n_2)$ spin chain with the symmetry group ${\rm SU}(n_1) \times {\rm SU}(n_2)$, valid for both ferromagnetic (FM) and antiferromagnetic (AF) cases. Moreover, the FM (AF) staggered ${\rm SU}(n)$ spin-$s$ chain is unitarily equivalent to the AF (FM) $q$-state QP model with $q=n^2$, as long as the size of the AF (FM) staggered ${\rm SU}(n)$ spin-$s$ chain is doubled. A combination of the two distinct types of unitary equivalences yields a family of models such that they are essentially identical, but appear in different guises. Some physical implications for unitary equivalence among different TL integrable models are clarified.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了Temperley-Lieb可积模型中两个重要序列之间的隐藏联系：自对偶点的q态量子Potts模型和交错SU(n)自旋-s链，并发现了对称群分解规律。
AI.motivation: 研究Temperley-Lieb可积模型中不同序列之间的内在联系，探索对称群分解规律，以及铁磁和反铁磁情况下的幺正等价性。
AI.method: 通过分析q态量子Potts模型和交错SU(n)自旋-s链的对称群结构，研究当q或n可分解时模型的幺正等价性，并建立不同模型之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 发现当q分解为q1和q2时，q态量子Potts模型幺正等价于具有对称群S_{q1}×S_{q2}的组合QP模型；当n分解为n1和n2时，交错SU(n)自旋-s链幺正等价于具有对称群SU(n1)×SU(n2)的组合交错自旋链。同时发现FM(AF)交错SU(n)自旋-s链幺正等价于AF(FM) q态QP模型（q=n^2）。
AI.conclusion: Temperley-Lieb可积模型中存在隐藏的对称群分解规律和幺正等价性，这些等价关系揭示了不同物理模型之间的本质联系，为理解可积模型提供了新的视角。

title: Framework for Quasiperiodic Interfaces: Proximal Coincidence Point Set and Computation
summary: We present a unified theoretical and computational framework that bridges mathematical quasiperiodicity with classical crystallographic models. Based on a rigorous cut-and-projection construction, the proposed proximal coincidence point set (PCPS) theory extends the classical coincidence site lattice model and further incorporates physically motivated perturbations encoding interfacial atomic mobility as well as visual indistinguishability. Spectral characteristics of PCPS naturally motivate a conserved Landau-Brazovskii model combined with projection method, yielding unified high accuracy in resolving quasiperiodic order across the entire interfacial plane. Representative quasiperiodic features are revealed in our numerical results, including generalized Fibonacci sequences in BCC [110] tilt GBs, as well as repetitive patterns within the interstices of dislocation networks in low-angle BCC [100] twist GBs and phase boundaries between BCC and face-centered cubic crystals. In high-angle BCC [100] twist GBs, 12- and 8-fold quasicrystals emerge, while the PCPS theory combined with cyclotomic field projections further explains their restrictions of non-crystallographic symmetries. This framework not only provides a rigorous theoretical explanation for interface structures but also offers a path toward modeling other types of incommensurate structures.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的理论计算框架，将数学准周期性与经典晶体学模型连接起来，通过近邻重合点集理论扩展传统重合点阵模型，结合Landau-Brazovskii模型和投影方法，准确解析界面准周期结构。
AI.motivation: 传统晶体学模型难以描述准周期界面结构，需要建立统一的理论框架来连接数学准周期性与实际晶体界面模型，解释界面原子迁移性和视觉不可区分性等物理现象。
AI.method: 基于严格的切割投影构造，提出近邻重合点集理论扩展经典重合点阵模型；结合守恒的Landau-Brazovskii模型和投影方法，通过谱特性分析准周期序；利用分圆域投影解释非晶体学对称性限制。
AI.result: 在BCC[110]倾斜晶界中发现了广义Fibonacci序列，在低角度BCC[100]扭转晶界中观察到位错网络间隙的重复图案，在高角度BCC[100]扭转晶界中出现了12重和8重准晶；理论成功解释了这些准周期特征。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅为界面结构提供了严格的理论解释，还为建模其他类型非公度结构提供了路径，成功连接了数学准周期性与经典晶体学模型。

title: Antiferromagnetic Pure Spin Current Memdevices
summary: Spin currents can be generated through various mechanisms, including the piezospintronic effect, which arises when strain or lattice distortions induce a change in the dipolar spin moment, causing a pure spin current without necessarily being accompanied by net charge transport. This opens new possibilities for low-power information processing and novel device architectures. In this work, we propose a novel effect, the spintronic-magneto-impedictive effect, as the theoretical basis for a pure spin-current memory-like device based on antiferromagnetic components. We focus on materials that can be modeled by the so-called spin-Rice-Mele Hamiltonian, incorporating a magnetic field gradient that explicitly breaks inversion symmetry. Our results shed light on how spin currents are generated and controlled, providing new insights into the potential of these materials for next-generation spintronic technologies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于反铁磁组件的纯自旋电流类存储器件的理论基础——自旋磁阻效应，通过自旋Rice-Mele哈密顿量建模，利用磁场梯度打破反演对称性来产生和控制自旋电流。
AI.motivation: 压电自旋电子效应等机制能够产生纯自旋电流而不伴随净电荷输运，这为低功耗信息处理和新型器件架构开辟了新可能。本文旨在探索基于反铁磁组件的纯自旋电流存储器件的理论基础。
AI.method: 采用自旋Rice-Mele哈密顿量对材料进行建模，引入明确打破反演对称性的磁场梯度，研究自旋电流的产生和控制机制。
AI.result: 揭示了自旋电流如何在这些材料中产生和控制，为理解这些材料在下一代自旋电子技术中的潜力提供了新见解。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自旋磁阻效应为基于反铁磁组件的纯自旋电流类存储器件提供了理论基础，展示了这些材料在下一代自旋电子技术中的应用潜力。

title: Microscopic view of materials properties of liquids: An atomic scale perspective
summary: Microscopic understanding of liquid properties is essential for advancing a wide range of applications from energy applications such as nuclear reactors and batteries to biomedical applications including drug delivery and microfluidics. However, intrinsic dynamic disorder and lack of structural periodicity in liquids have presented fundamental challenges in developing rigorous microscopic theories of their thermodynamic and dynamic behavior. Recent breakthroughs in computational power and experimental metrologies have driven significant progress in unraveling the complex atomic scale dynamics of liquids. In this Review, we provide a brief historical context of liquid state physics and explore recent advances through theoretical, computational, and experimental approaches. For theoretical and computational approaches, instantaneous normal mode and velocity autocorrelation function calculations are discussed. For experiments, we focus on X-ray and neutron scattering techniques that probe liquid dynamics at the atomic level. Finally, we highlight emerging opportunities and future directions in the study of liquid atomic dynamics.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述回顾了液体原子尺度动力学的研究进展，涵盖理论、计算和实验方法，并展望未来方向。
AI.motivation: 液体在能源和生物医学等领域有广泛应用，但由于其动态无序性和缺乏结构周期性，发展严格的微观理论面临根本挑战。计算能力和实验技术的突破为理解液体原子尺度动力学提供了新机遇。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，首先提供液体物理学的历史背景，然后从理论、计算和实验三个角度探讨最新进展：理论计算方面讨论瞬时简正模和速度自相关函数计算；实验方面聚焦于X射线和中子散射技术。
AI.result: 通过整合理论、计算和实验方法，揭示了液体原子尺度动力学的复杂特性，为理解液体热力学和动态行为提供了更全面的微观视角。
AI.conclusion: 液体原子动力学研究已取得显著进展，但仍面临挑战。未来需要进一步发展多尺度方法、结合先进计算与实验技术，以更深入理解液体性质并推动相关应用领域发展。

title: Non-invertible symmetries and boundary conditions for the transverse-field Ising model
summary: Non-invertible Kramers-Wannier (KW) duality symmetries are constructed for the transverse-field Ising model (TFIM) at the self-dual point under various boundary conditions (BCs), as long as the resultant Hamiltonian commutes with the ${\rm Z}_2$ symmetry operator. This is achieved by introducing extra degrees of freedom into the Hilbert space, in order to turn a non-translation-invariant Hamiltonian in the original Hilbert space into a translation-invariant Hamiltonian in the augmented Hilbert space. One may lift the trivial identity operator, the ${\rm Z}_2$ symmetry operator and the non-invertible KW duality symmetry operator to their counterparts in the augmented Hilbert space, valid for each of four types of toroidal BCs. As it turns out, they yield a lattice version of fusion rules, which bears a resemblance to the Tambara-Yamagami ${\rm Z}_2$ fusion category. Our construction is thus consistent with the basic physical requirement that all possible BCs should yield a converging result in the thermodynamic limit. In particular, the lattice versions of fusion rules, constructed by Seiberg, Seifnashri and Shao [SciPost Phys. \textbf{16}, 154 (2024)], are reproduced for periodic and anti-periodic BCs, but a discrepancy is revealed for duality-twisted BCs.

AI.tldr: 该论文为非可逆Kramers-Wannier对偶对称性在横向场伊辛模型自对偶点处构建了晶格版本，通过引入额外自由度将非平移不变哈密顿量转化为扩充希尔伯特空间中的平移不变哈密顿量，得到了与Tambara-Yamagami Z2融合范畴相似的晶格融合规则。
AI.motivation: 研究横向场伊辛模型在自对偶点处的非可逆Kramers-Wannier对偶对称性，解决不同边界条件下哈密顿量的构造问题，确保所有可能的边界条件在热力学极限下给出收敛结果。
AI.method: 通过引入额外自由度到希尔伯特空间，将原始空间中的非平移不变哈密顿量转化为扩充空间中的平移不变哈密顿量，构建了四种环面边界条件下的Z2对称算符和非可逆KW对偶对称算符的扩充版本。
AI.result: 得到了晶格版本的融合规则，与Tambara-Yamagami Z2融合范畴相似；对于周期和反周期边界条件，重现了Seiberg等人的结果，但对于对偶扭曲边界条件揭示了差异。
AI.conclusion: 该构造满足所有边界条件在热力学极限下收敛的基本物理要求，为非可逆对称性的晶格实现提供了系统框架，并揭示了不同边界条件下的结果差异。

title: First Plasma Atomic Layer Etching of Diamond via O$_2$/Kr Chemistry
summary:
We report the first plasma atomic layer etching (ALE) process for diamond using a cyclic plasma sequence composed of two separated steps: oxygen surface modification and krypton ion removal. The process is implemented in an inductively coupled plasma reactor using alternating O$_2$ plasma exposure and low-energy Kr ion bombardment.
