  This cyclic process exhibits the characteristic self-limiting behavior of ALE and enables controlled material removal with atomic-scale precision. An etch depth per cycle of \SI{6.85}{\angstrom} was achieved. Surface analysis reveals that the etched diamond surfaces exhibit lower roughness than the pristine material, while XPS confirms the preservation of the diamond bonding structure and indicates essentially damage-free etching.
  These results demonstrate that plasma ALE based on O$_2$/Kr chemistry provides a viable route toward damage-controlled nanoscale processing of diamond, opening new opportunities for advanced device fabrication in power electronics, photonics, quantum sensing and quantum computing technologies.

AI.tldr: 首次实现金刚石的等离子体原子层刻蚀（ALE），采用O₂等离子体表面改性和Kr离子去除的循环工艺，实现原子级精度的可控刻蚀。
AI.motivation: 金刚石在功率电子、光子学、量子传感和量子计算等领域有重要应用，但传统刻蚀方法容易造成损伤。需要开发一种能实现原子级精度、无损伤的刻蚀技术。
AI.method: 在电感耦合等离子体反应器中，采用循环工艺：第一步用O₂等离子体进行表面改性，第二步用低能Kr离子轰击去除改性层。这种两步分离的工艺实现了自限制刻蚀行为。
AI.result: 实现了每循环6.85Å的刻蚀深度，刻蚀后的金刚石表面粗糙度比原始材料更低。XPS分析证实金刚石键合结构得以保留，表明基本无损伤的刻蚀过程。
AI.conclusion: 基于O₂/Kr化学的等离子体ALE为金刚石的无损伤纳米级加工提供了可行途径，为先进器件制造开辟了新机会。

title: Invariant ionic conductance in an atomically thin polar nanopore
summary: Ion channels regulate many essential properties of biological cells, especially the membrane potential. Despite decades of efforts on artificial channels, it remains a great challenge to mimic the dipole potential-an indispensable constituent of the membrane potential, due to its angstrom-scale characteristic length. Here, we explore nanopores in monolayer molybdenum sulfide selenide (MoSSe) considering its intrinsic dipole and atomic thickness. Remarkably, an invariant ionic conductance was observed over salt concentrations spanning six orders of magnitude, distinct from all known conductance-concentration scaling laws and reminiscent of the current saturation in cell membranes at high concentrations. Molecular dynamics simulations revealed the fundamental role of the dipole-modulated dielectric properties of nanoconfined water. Our findings highlight an exotic conductance scaling law and open up a novel avenue for controlling ion transport in unprecedented ways.

AI.tldr: 单层MoSSe纳米孔展现独特的离子电导率不变现象，跨越六个数量级盐浓度，模拟细胞膜电位中的偶极电位特性
AI.motivation: 模仿细胞膜电位中的偶极电位（dipole potential）一直是个巨大挑战，因为其具有埃米尺度的特征长度。传统人工通道难以再现这一重要生物特性。
AI.method: 利用单层二硫化钼硒（MoSSe）纳米孔，利用其固有的偶极矩和原子级厚度特性，通过分子动力学模拟研究受限水的介电性质如何被偶极调制。
AI.result: 观察到离子电导率在跨越六个数量级的盐浓度范围内保持不变，这与所有已知的电导-浓度标度律都不同，类似于细胞膜在高浓度下的电流饱和现象。
AI.conclusion: 发现了一种奇异的电导标度律，揭示了偶极调制纳米受限水介电性质的基本作用，为控制离子传输开辟了新途径。

title: An Accurate Tensorial Model for Prediction of Full Zeolite NMR Spectra
summary: Solid state nuclear magnetic resonance (ss-NMR) is one of the most sensitive and popular techniques for structure elucidation in geometrically complex crystalline materials, such as zeolites. Synergistic support from computational modelling is vital to interpret experimental spectra, and relate ss-NMR to atomistic models. Nevertheless, computational predictions are hindered by the high expense of calculating magnetic shielding (MS) and electric field gradient (EFG) tensors from first principles. In this work, we leverage a novel tensorial machine learning approach to train a general model for predicting complete NMR tensors. We demonstrate the utility of the approach for a diverse dataset of zeolitic materials and NMR-active nuclei ($^{27}$Al, $^{29}$Si, $^{17}$O, $^{23}$Na and $^{1}$H), predicting all NMR observables to a high degree of precision. These observables are then translated into predictions of the full $^{27}$Al and $^{29}$Si ss-nMR spectra for the exemplary zeolite RTH. Thus, this work opens a pathway to accurate, high-throughput NMR simulation for large-scale and realistic models of chemically complex zeolites.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于张量机器学习的方法，用于高效预测固体核磁共振（ss-NMR）的完整张量参数，显著降低了计算成本，并在多种沸石材料和核素上验证了高精度预测能力。
AI.motivation: 固体核磁共振是解析复杂晶体材料（如沸石）结构的关键技术，但传统第一性原理计算磁屏蔽和电场梯度张量的计算成本极高，限制了其应用。需要开发高效的计算方法来支持实验光谱解释和原子模型关联。
AI.method: 采用新颖的张量机器学习方法，训练一个通用模型来预测完整的NMR张量。该方法应用于多种沸石材料和NMR活性核素（27Al、29Si、17O、23Na和1H），能够高精度预测所有NMR可观测参数。
AI.result: 模型能够高精度预测所有NMR可观测参数，并以RTH沸石为例，成功预测了完整的27Al和29Si固体核磁共振光谱。该方法为大规模、化学复杂沸石的准确、高通量NMR模拟开辟了新途径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究开发了一种高效的张量机器学习方法，能够准确预测复杂沸石材料的NMR参数，显著降低了计算成本，为大规模、化学复杂材料的核磁共振模拟提供了实用工具。

title: Universally Diverging Grüneisen Ratio of Holographic Quantum Criticality
summary: Quantum criticality is a hallmark of strongly correlated electron systems, as seen in heavy-fermion materials and high-temperature superconductors. Holographic duality provides a powerful framework to investigate these systems by translating them into weakly coupled classical gravity living in one higher dimension. Here, we harness this approach to study a field-induced quantum critical point with dynamical exponent $z=3$ in Einstein-Maxwell-Chern-Simons theory. Our analysis of its thermodynamic properties reveals a new universality class. Notably, we identify a diverging Grüneisen ratio with universal scaling $\sim T^{-2/3}$, a behavior that closely mirrors recent experiments on the heavy-fermion material CeRh$_6$Ge$_4$. These findings advance our understanding of metallic quantum criticality and highlight the potential of holographic duality as a tool for studying correlated quantum matters.

AI.tldr: 利用全息对偶研究z=3的场致量子临界点，发现新的普适类，Grüneisen比发散行为与重费米子材料实验一致
AI.motivation: 量子临界性是强关联电子系统的重要特征，但理论研究困难。全息对偶为研究这类系统提供了有力框架，可将强关联问题转化为弱耦合的经典引力问题
AI.method: 采用爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦-陈-西蒙斯理论中的全息对偶方法，研究具有动力学指数z=3的场致量子临界点
AI.result: 发现新的普适类，Grüneisen比以普适标度T^{-2/3}发散，这与重费米子材料CeRh6Ge4的实验结果高度一致
AI.conclusion: 研究推进了对金属量子临界性的理解，并突显了全息对偶作为研究关联量子物质的有力工具的潜力

title: Towards Computational Microscope of Chemical Order-Disorder via ML-Accelerated Monte Carlo Simulation
summary: Tailoring the performance of next-generation high entropy materials requires a deep understanding of the competition between entropy-driven random solid solution and enthalpy-driven chemical ordering. Investigating such order and disorder complexity demands atomistic simulations that achieve high accuracy, efficiency, and generalizability across vast spatial, temporal, and especially chemical scales. While machine learning (ML) interatomic potentials have transformed molecular dynamics, they remain limited in capturing diffusion-driven chemical evolution over long timescales. The recently introduced SMC-X method brings exciting opportunities. Realizing its full potential requires a comprehensive study, which is the focus of this work. To assess model performance, we systematically benchmark invariant and equivariant architectures using a density functional theory dataset of more than 10,000 configurations spanning seven elements: Fe, Co, Ni, Al, Ti, Ta, and V. To understand the roles of pairwise and higher-order interactions, we decouple their contributions across chemical space using an explainable machine learning approach. We also examine the impact of lattice relaxation by comparing models trained on datasets with and without structural relaxation. Our results clarify how to choose ML surrogate models for Monte Carlo simulations, bridge the gap between theory and experiment, and lay a foundation for establishing ML-accelerated Monte Carlo as a computational microscope for chemical complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了机器学习原子间势在蒙特卡洛模拟中的性能，通过DFT数据集对比不变与等变架构，解耦化学相互作用，为ML加速MC模拟提供指导。
AI.motivation: 下一代高熵材料的性能优化需要理解熵驱动随机固溶体与焓驱动化学有序之间的竞争，这需要能在广阔空间、时间和化学尺度上实现高精度、高效和普适性的原子模拟。虽然机器学习原子间势已改变分子动力学，但在捕捉长时间尺度扩散驱动的化学演化方面仍有局限。
AI.method: 使用包含Fe、Co、Ni、Al、Ti、Ta、V七种元素的10,000多个DFT构型数据集，系统基准测试不变和等变架构模型。通过可解释机器学习方法解耦化学空间中成对和高阶相互作用的贡献。比较在有无结构弛豫数据集上训练的模型，研究晶格弛豫的影响。
AI.result: 研究结果阐明了如何为蒙特卡洛模拟选择机器学习代理模型，弥合了理论与实验之间的差距，为建立ML加速蒙特卡洛作为化学复杂性的计算显微镜奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为利用机器学习原子间势进行蒙特卡洛模拟提供了系统指导，特别是通过SMC-X方法实现长时间尺度化学演化模拟，为高熵材料设计提供了计算工具。

title: Efficient photo-Nernst terahertz emission in single heavy-metal films
summary: State-of-the-art metallic terahertz (THz) emitters rely predominantly on spintronic heterostructures, where heavy metals serve as passive spin-to-charge converters. Here, we demonstrate efficient THz radiation from standalone Pt nanofilms at cryogenic temperatures and under external magnetic fields. The governing mechanism is identified as the ultrafast photo-Nernst effect, wherein a transient thermal gradient drives a transverse charge current. The THz emission polarity is directly dictated by the sign of the Nernst coefficient, as verified by the phase reversal observed between Pt and W or Ta. Remarkably, both thickness scaling and alloying-induced suppression of thermal conductivity independently amplify the single-layer emission to levels comparable with benchmark spintronic bilayers. These findings redefine the established role of heavy metals from passive spin-sinks to active THz emitters, uncovering a universal emission paradigm applicable across diverse spintronic and quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 单层Pt纳米薄膜在低温磁场下通过光能斯特效应产生高效太赫兹辐射，重新定义了重金属在太赫兹发射中的角色
AI.motivation: 现有太赫兹发射器主要依赖自旋电子异质结构，其中重金属仅作为被动的自旋-电荷转换器。本研究旨在探索重金属本身作为主动太赫兹发射器的潜力。
AI.method: 在低温条件下对外加磁场中的独立Pt纳米薄膜进行研究，通过厚度缩放和合金化抑制热导率来增强发射效率，并与W、Ta等材料进行对比验证。
AI.result: 发现Pt纳米薄膜通过超快光能斯特效应产生高效太赫兹辐射，发射极性由能斯特系数符号决定，单层发射强度可与基准自旋电子双层结构相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 重金属在太赫兹发射中的角色从被动自旋汇重新定义为主动发射器，这一普适发射范式可广泛应用于各种自旋电子和量子材料。

title: Colossal Terahertz Magnetoresistance from Magnetic Polarons in EuZn$_2$P$_2$
summary: Magnetic polarons can generate colossal magnetoresistance in magnetic semiconductors, yet their terahertz electrodynamics remain largely unexplored. Here we report magneto-terahertz spectroscopy of the Eu-based Zintl antiferromagnet EuZn$_2$P$_2$. The low-frequency conductivity shows pronounced non-Drude behavior consistent with an evolution from isolated to overlapping magnetic polarons upon cooling. The polaron relaxation time reaches a maximum at the Néel temperature and exhibits a strong magnetic-field dependence. This polaron-driven reshaping of the conductivity leads to a strongly frequency-dependent magnetoresistance that becomes colossal in the terahertz range, reaching about 90 % at 1.5 THz, roughly three times larger than the zero-frequency limit value. These results demonstrate that magnetic polarons strongly govern the low-energy electrodynamics and highlight the sensitivity of terahertz spectroscopy to polaronic magnetotransport in correlated magnetic semiconductors.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过太赫兹光谱学揭示了EuZn₂P₂中磁极化子对低频电导率的显著影响，发现太赫兹范围内的巨磁阻效应比零频极限值大三倍。
AI.motivation: 磁极化子可以在磁性半导体中产生巨磁阻效应，但其太赫兹电动力学特性尚未得到充分探索。本研究旨在通过太赫兹光谱学揭示磁极化子在相关磁性半导体中的电动力学行为。
AI.method: 采用磁-太赫兹光谱学技术研究Eu基Zintl反铁磁体EuZn₂P₂。通过分析低频电导率的非德鲁德行为，追踪从孤立到重叠磁极化子的演化过程，并测量极化子弛豫时间随温度和磁场的变化。
AI.result: 发现极化子弛豫时间在奈尔温度处达到最大值，并表现出强烈的磁场依赖性。磁极化子驱动的电导率重塑导致频率依赖的磁阻效应，在1.5 THz处达到约90%的巨磁阻值，比零频极限值大约三倍。
AI.conclusion: 磁极化子强烈主导低能电动力学，太赫兹光谱学对相关磁性半导体中的极化子磁输运具有高度敏感性，为理解磁极化子物理提供了新的实验途径。

title: Floquet generation of hybrid-order topology and $\mathbb{Z}_2$-like bipolar localization
summary: Higher order topology, in the form of the emergence of corner modes, is observed in two dimensions when crystalline symmetries are superposed on the Altland-Zirnbauer classification of topological insulators. It occurs in Benalcazar-Bernevig-Hughes (BBH) model on a 2D square lattice, which owing to an embedded $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge field, features a bulk quadrupole moment with localized zero-energy corner states. Further, as a dividend, the BBH model transmutes the general notion of the space-time inversion ($\mathcal{PT}$) symmetry and behaves as a spinful system, without having to invoke `real' spin degrees of freedom. A two-fold engineering of the model, namely a periodic drive, followed by a non-reciprocal hopping render intriguing consequences. As a first, the drive activates first-order topology, and the resulting Floquet phase hosts a coexistence of first-order conducting edges at both zero and $π$ quasienergies along with higher order corner states, which qualifies the coexisting state to be denoted as a hybrid-order topological phase. Further, inclusion of non-reciprocal couplings features a $\mathbb{Z}_2$-like skin effect which demonstrates a drive-induced transition from a unipolar to a bipolar localized phase, and is evidenced via the generalized Brillouin zone (GBZ) theory. While depiction of a GBZ in 2D is challenging, a corresponding 1D map is still possible and can be implemented by exploiting the mirror symmetry. We further uncover conditions under which the skin effect is completely suppressed in our system. Putting together, our results manifest an efficient technique to dynamically engender and control Hermitian and non-Hermitian topological features, that remain otherwise masked in a static scenario.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过周期驱动和非互易耦合工程化BBH模型，实现了从高阶拓扑到混合阶拓扑相的转变，并展示了驱动诱导的皮肤效应转变。
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过动态调控（周期驱动和非互易耦合）来激发和控制静态系统中被掩盖的拓扑特征，包括高阶拓扑、混合阶拓扑相和非厄米皮肤效应。
AI.method: 对Benalcazar-Bernevig-Hughes (BBH) 模型进行双重工程化：1）施加周期驱动激活一阶拓扑；2）引入非互易耦合产生皮肤效应。利用广义布里渊区理论和镜像对称性分析二维系统中的皮肤效应。
AI.result: 1）周期驱动将高阶拓扑系统转变为混合阶拓扑相，同时存在一阶导电边缘态（零和π准能）和高阶角态；2）非互易耦合产生ℤ₂类皮肤效应，驱动诱导从单极到双极局域相的转变；3）发现了完全抑制皮肤效应的条件。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了一种有效的动态技术来激发和控制厄米和非厄米拓扑特征，这些特征在静态场景中通常被掩盖，为拓扑相的可控工程提供了新途径。

title: Adsorption energies and decomposition barrier heights for ethylene carbonate on the surface of lithium from cluster-based quantum chemistry
summary: For ethylene carbonate on the (100) surface of lithium, we calculate the adsorption energy in two binding motifs as well as the barrier height for a ring-opening decomposition reaction. We validate a scheme for producing results in the thermodynamic limit by correcting results obtained on finite lithium clusters containing only 40-100 atoms, which enables the use of hybrid density functionals, the random-phase approximation, and correlated wavefunction theories such as coupled-cluster theory and auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo. We find that the high-level theories agree to within 2-5 kcal/mol and can therefore serve as benchmarks for more affordable methods. Using our reference data, we demonstrate that generalized gradient approximation functionals, such as PBE, are not sufficiently accurate for reaction barrier heights, and we identify $ω$B97X-V as an especially promising functional for the interfacial chemistry of electrolyte solvents at lithium metal anodes.

AI.tldr: 该研究计算了碳酸乙烯酯在锂(100)表面的吸附能和环开分解反应能垒，开发了从有限锂簇到热力学极限的校正方案，验证了高级量子化学方法的准确性，并推荐了适用于锂金属阳极界面化学的密度泛函。
AI.motivation: 研究锂金属阳极与电解质溶剂界面的化学反应对电池性能至关重要，但需要准确的计算方法来预测吸附能和反应能垒。现有密度泛函方法在描述这类界面化学时准确性不足，需要建立可靠的基准数据来评估和改进计算方法。
AI.method: 采用从有限锂簇（40-100个原子）到热力学极限的校正方案，使用杂化密度泛函、随机相位近似、耦合簇理论和辅助场量子蒙特卡洛等高精度量子化学方法进行计算验证。
AI.result: 高级理论方法（耦合簇、量子蒙特卡洛等）在2-5 kcal/mol范围内一致，可作为基准。广义梯度近似泛函（如PBE）对反应能垒不够准确，而ωB97X-V泛函在锂金属阳极界面化学中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 建立了锂金属阳极界面化学的可靠计算基准，推荐使用ωB97X-V泛函进行相关研究，为电池电解质界面反应的高精度计算提供了方法学指导。

title: Band structure control in the altermagnetic candidate MnTe by temperature and strain
comment: Main 5 pages and 4 figures, supplementary material 4 pages, 3 figures
summary: The temperature and strain dependences of the optical conductivity spectrum of hexagonal manganese telluride (MnTe) were measured, revealing absorption in the terahertz (THz) region from spin-split bands to acceptor levels. The temperature dependence of the THz absorption peak is consistent with that of a ferromagnetic phase transition, even though MnTe exhibits no net magnetism. The temperature dependence was attributed to a change in the altermagnetic electronic structure. A Fano-like antisymmetric line shape in the optical phonon absorption was observed, which originates from the interaction between optical phonons and the spin-split bands. Additionally, under negative uniaxial pressure, the THz peak shifts away from the Fermi level (EF), suggesting that spin-splitting bands at energies away from EF, consistent with the theoretical prediction that the spin-splitting angle decreases. The observed behavior of the THz peak clearly shows that MnTe has the altermagnetic electronic structure.

AI.tldr: 通过测量六方碲化锰的光导谱，发现太赫兹吸收峰与铁磁相变温度一致，但材料无净磁性，证实了其为反铁磁自旋分裂能带结构（altermagnetism）。
AI.motivation: 研究六方碲化锰（MnTe）的光学性质，特别是太赫兹区域的吸收特性，以探索其独特的磁性电子结构，尽管该材料没有净磁性，但表现出类似铁磁相变的温度依赖性。
AI.method: 测量六方碲化锰的光导谱随温度和应变的变化，分析太赫兹区域的吸收峰，观察光学声子吸收的Fano线形，并在负单轴压力下研究太赫兹峰的移动。
AI.result: 太赫兹吸收峰的温度依赖性与铁磁相变一致，但材料无净磁性；观察到光学声子与自旋分裂能带相互作用导致的Fano线形；负单轴压力下太赫兹峰远离费米能级，与理论预测的自旋分裂角减小一致。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明MnTe具有反铁磁自旋分裂能带结构（altermagnetism），其独特的太赫兹吸收特性源于自旋分裂能带与受主能级之间的跃迁，为理解这类新型磁性材料提供了重要实验证据。

title: Engineering magnetism in hybrid organic-inorganic metal halide perovskites
summary: The chemical and structural flexibility of hybrid organic-inorganic metal halide perovskites (HOIPs) provides an ideal platform for engineering not only their well-studied optical properties, but also their magnetic ones. In this review we present HOIPs from a new perspective, turning the attention to their magnetic properties and their potential as new class of on-demand low-dimensional magnetic materials. Focusing on HOIPs containing transition metals, we comprehensively present the progress that has been made in preparing, understanding and exploring magnetic HOIPs. First, we briefly introduce HOIPs in terms of composition and crystal structure and examine the synthesis protocols commonly used to prepare those showing magnetic properties. Then, we present their rich magnetic behavior and phenomenology; discuss their origin and guidelines for tuning them by changing the perovskite phase, chemical composition and dimensionality; and showcase their potential application in magneto-optoelectronics and spintronics. Finally, we describe the current challenges in the field, such as their integration into devices, as well as the emerging possibilities of moving from magnetic doping to pure transition metal-based HOIPs, which will motivate further studies in the future.

AI.tldr: 综述文章探讨了有机-无机杂化金属卤化物钙钛矿（HOIPs）的磁性特性，重点关注含过渡金属的HOIPs，介绍了其合成方法、磁性行为、调控策略以及在磁光电子学和自旋电子学中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: HOIPs的化学和结构灵活性不仅为调控其光学性质提供了理想平台，也为开发其磁性特性创造了机会。本文旨在从磁性角度重新审视HOIPs，探索其作为可按需设计的低维磁性材料的潜力。
AI.method: 采用综述研究方法，系统梳理含过渡金属HOIPs的制备进展、磁性行为理解及应用探索。首先介绍HOIPs的组成和晶体结构，分析磁性HOIPs的合成方法；然后详细阐述其丰富的磁性现象、起源机制和调控策略；最后探讨在器件集成方面的挑战和未来发展方向。
AI.result: 系统总结了HOIPs磁性研究的最新进展，展示了通过改变钙钛矿相、化学组成和维度来调控其磁性的方法，并论证了其在磁光电子学和自旋电子学中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: HOIPs展现出作为新型低维磁性材料的巨大潜力，当前挑战在于器件集成，未来发展方向包括从磁性掺杂转向纯过渡金属基HOIPs，这将推动该领域的进一步研究。

title: Engineering chiral-induced spin selectivity in an artificial topological quantum well
summary: Chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS) is a striking phenomenon in which spin-unpolarized electrons become spin-polarized after traversing a chiral medium. Theoretical studies have shown that spin-orbit coupling, geometric chirality, and dephasing act cooperatively for this effect to emerge. Inspired by this, we demonstrate a solid-state realization of CISS in an engineered InAs/GaSb quantum well where geometric chirality and dephasing can be introduced controllably. Introducing a chiral structure produces a clear spin polarization whose sign reverses when the chirality is flipped, and whose magnitude grows systematically with the number of dephasing electrodes, while achiral configurations exhibit no spin selectivity. The polarization remains robust even under strong Anderson disorder, showing that the engineered chiral structures provides an intrinsically stable route to spin-selective transport. These results establish a solid-state platform in the topological quantum well system for controllably generating the CISS effect.

AI.tldr: 在InAs/GaSb量子阱中实现了手性诱导自旋选择性(CISS)的固态平台，通过可控引入手性结构和退相干电极，实现了可翻转的自旋极化。
AI.motivation: 手性诱导自旋选择性(CISS)现象中，非自旋极化的电子穿过手性介质后会产生自旋极化。理论研究表明自旋轨道耦合、几何手性和退相干共同作用产生这一效应。本研究旨在固态系统中可控地实现CISS效应。
AI.method: 使用工程化的InAs/GaSb量子阱平台，可控地引入几何手性和退相干电极。通过改变手性结构的方向和退相干电极的数量来系统研究CISS效应。
AI.result: 手性结构产生明显的自旋极化，当手性翻转时极化符号反转，极化幅度随退相干电极数量系统增加。非手性结构无自旋选择性。即使在强安德森无序下，极化仍保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 在拓扑量子阱系统中建立了可控生成CISS效应的固态平台，工程化的手性结构为自旋选择性输运提供了内在稳定的途径。

title: Decoupling Precipitation and Surface Complexation during Mn(II) Removal by Biochar via Experiments and Atomistic Simulations
summary: Manganese(II) mobilised by mining activity poses a persistent water-quality challenge, yet the mechanisms by which low-cost sorbents, such as biochar, sequester Mn(II) remain poorly resolved. This study identifies the specific chemical drivers of Mn(II) sequestration by combining fixed-bed column and batch experiments with atomistic molecular dynamics simulations. Oilseed rape straw biochars, produced at 350\textdegree C, 550\textdegree C, and 700\textdegree C, removed 20-50% of dissolved Mn from acidic influent (pH 4, 5 ppm). High-temperature biochar achieved the greatest removal ($\sim$50%) and rapidly increased effluent pH to 9, triggering alkaline precipitation. Conversely, lower-temperature biochars removed 20-30% of Mn while maintaining a near-neutral pH (7-7.5). Enhanced \ce{K+} release in these systems indicates significant cation exchange and non-precipitative pathways. Molecular simulations confirmed that while neutral surfaces show weak Mn(II) association, deprotonated sites drive strong adsorption through inner-sphere complexation ($\sim$50% removal) and outer-sphere association ($\sim$10%). These results establish a mechanistic framework to distinguish between precipitation-led and surface-complexation-led removal. By providing specific chemical criteria for Mn-targeted sequestration, this work enables the rational design of engineered biochars for sustainable water remediation.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示了生物炭吸附锰(II)的化学机制，区分了碱性沉淀和表面络合两种主要去除途径，为设计靶向锰去除的工程化生物炭提供了化学标准。
AI.motivation: 采矿活动导致锰(II)污染成为持续的水质挑战，但低成本吸附剂（如生物炭）对锰(II)的固定机制尚不明确，需要建立区分不同去除途径的化学标准。
AI.method: 结合固定床柱实验、批量实验和原子分子动力学模拟，使用350°C、550°C和700°C制备的油菜秸秆生物炭，在酸性条件(pH 4, 5 ppm)下研究锰(II)去除机制。
AI.result: 高温生物炭(700°C)去除率最高(~50%)，通过碱性沉淀(pH升至9)实现；低温生物炭(350-550°C)去除率20-30%，通过阳离子交换和表面络合(pH保持中性)实现。分子模拟证实去质子化位点驱动强吸附。
AI.conclusion: 建立了区分沉淀主导和表面络合主导去除的机制框架，为设计靶向锰去除的工程化生物炭提供了具体的化学标准，支持可持续水修复。

title: Dynamical spin correlations in kagome antiferromagnets: comparison of Abrikosov fermion and Schwinger boson approaches beyond mean field
summary: Quantum spin liquids exhibit fractionalized spin excitations as a consequence of strong quantum many-body effects. The kagome antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model is a promising candidate for a quantum spin-liquid ground state; however, the nature of its excitation spectrum remains controversial, particularly regarding the presence of a spin gap and the gauge structure coupled to fractional quasiparticles. To address these issues, parton approaches have been extensively employed, where spin operators are represented in terms of fermionic or bosonic quasiparticles within the Abrikosov fermion and Schwinger boson frameworks. Thus far, these approaches have been pursued independently, and it has remained unclear how the results obtained from these frameworks compare, particularly with respect to the spin dynamics and gauge structure of the kagome antiferromagnet. Here, we investigate the dynamical spin structure factor of the antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model with a Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction on the kagome lattice, relevant to herbertsmithite, by employing both approaches. We find that the dynamical spin structure factor obtained from the Abrikosov fermion mean-field theory exhibits dome-shaped features, and that its continuum structure significantly depends on the gauge structure of the spin-liquid ansatz. On the other hand, the Schwinger boson mean-field theory yields a concave-down structure in the low-energy region, distinct from that obtained using the Abrikosov fermion approach. Moreover, incorporating many-body effects beyond the mean-field approximation substantially reduces the low-energy gap and enhances the low-energy spectral weight, consistent with experimental observations. Our results suggest the importance of many-body effects in the Schwinger boson theory for capturing the low-energy spin dynamics of kagome antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 比较Abrikosov费米子和Schwinger玻色子两种parton方法研究Kagome反铁磁海森堡模型的动态自旋结构因子，发现两种方法给出不同的低能谱结构，Schwinger玻色子方法结合多体效应能更好描述实验观测。
AI.motivation: Kagome反铁磁海森堡模型是量子自旋液体的候选体系，但其激发谱性质存在争议，特别是自旋能隙和与分数准粒子耦合的规范结构。不同parton方法（Abrikosov费米子和Schwinger玻色子）的结果尚未系统比较。
AI.method: 使用Abrikosov费米子平均场理论和Schwinger玻色子平均场理论，研究Kagome晶格上具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的反铁磁海森堡模型的动态自旋结构因子，并超越平均场近似考虑多体效应。
AI.result: Abrikosov费米子方法得到穹顶状特征，其连续谱结构强烈依赖于自旋液体ansatz的规范结构；Schwinger玻色子方法在低能区给出凹向下结构。超越平均场的多体效应显著降低低能隙并增强低能谱权重，与实验观测一致。
AI.conclusion: Schwinger玻色子理论中的多体效应对捕捉Kagome反铁磁体的低能自旋动力学至关重要，两种parton方法在描述低能谱结构上存在显著差异。

title: Inverse design of heterodeformations for strain soliton networks in bilayer 2D materials
summary: Strain soliton networks strongly influence the structural and electronic properties of heterodeformed bilayer systems, yet their design remains challenging due to the high dimensionality of heterodeformation space and the absence of a direct map between deformation and network geometry. In this work, we introduce a geometric framework that establishes a one-to-one mapping between heterodeformations and the geometry of the strain soliton network expressed as line vector-Burgers vector pairs. The admissible networks are constrained by topology dictated by the generalized stacking fault energy landscape. We show that the moiré Bravais lattice, corresponding to a uniform heterodeformation, alone is insufficient to characterize the interface: distinct heterodeformations can share identical moiré Bravais lattices while producing different soliton networks, reflecting an inherent many-to-one mapping when only translational symmetry is considered. In contrast, the soliton network encodes the full multilattice geometry of the interface, including topology and connectivity, which are not captured by the moiré Bravais lattice alone. The proposed framework enables the direct construction of heterodeformations from target networks, providing a systematic route for inverse design of moiré interfaces beyond conventional twist-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出几何框架建立异质变形与应变孤子网络的一一映射，实现莫尔界面的逆向设计
AI.motivation: 应变孤子网络对异质变形双层系统的结构和电子性质有重要影响，但由于异质变形空间维度高且缺乏变形与网络几何的直接映射，其设计具有挑战性
AI.method: 引入几何框架，建立异质变形与应变孤子网络（线矢量-伯格斯矢量对）之间的一一映射，网络受广义堆垛层错能拓扑约束
AI.result: 莫尔布拉维晶格（对应均匀异质变形）不足以表征界面：不同异质变形可共享相同莫尔布拉维晶格但产生不同孤子网络；孤子网络编码了界面的完整多晶格几何，包括拓扑和连通性
AI.conclusion: 该框架支持从目标网络直接构建异质变形，为超越传统扭转方法的莫尔界面逆向设计提供了系统途径

title: Electrically controllable valence-conduction band reversals in helical trilayer graphene
summary: In moiré graphene systems, electronic interactions lift spin and valley degeneracies, leading to symmetry-broken ground states. In helical trilayer graphene (HTG), we uncover a distinct interaction-driven mechanism in which the roles of sublattice-polarized valence and conduction bands are cyclically reversed. Using scanning nano-SQUID magnetometry, we detect a series of sharp magnetic signatures consistent with seesaw-like transitions, where occupied and unoccupied valence and conduction bands interchange repeatedly with doping, accompanied by a novel form of magnetic hysteresis. These transitions occur entirely within metallic regimes and leave only weak fingerprints in transport measurements. Self-consistent Hartree-Fock calculations reveal that interactions reorganize all eight low-energy flat bands, driving abrupt changes in orbital magnetization. Our results establish HTG as the first system where electronic interactions provide doping-controlled access to all three internal degrees of freedom - spin, valley, and sublattice - introducing a new class of correlated phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 在螺旋三层石墨烯中，发现了一种新型相互作用驱动的相变机制，通过掺杂控制可访问所有三种内部自由度（自旋、谷、子晶格），表现为金属态中的周期性磁跃迁。
AI.motivation: 研究螺旋三层石墨烯中电子相互作用如何调控自旋、谷和子晶格自由度，探索新型关联相变机制，超越传统对称性破缺范式。
AI.method: 使用扫描纳米SQUID磁强计进行磁学测量，结合自洽Hartree-Fock计算分析八个低能平带的相互作用重组效应。
AI.result: 观测到一系列尖锐的磁信号，对应跷跷板式跃迁，其中价带和导带的占据与非占据状态随掺杂周期性反转，伴随新型磁滞现象。这些跃迁完全发生在金属态中，在输运测量中仅留下微弱痕迹。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋三层石墨烯是首个通过电子相互作用提供掺杂控制访问所有三种内部自由度的系统，引入了一类新型关联相变，其中轨道磁化发生突变。

title: Characterizing High-Capacity Janus Aminobenzene-Graphene Anode for Sodium-Ion Batteries with Machine Learning
summary: Sodium-ion batteries require anodes that combine high capacity, low operating voltage, fast Na-ion transport, and mechanical stability, which conventional anodes struggle to deliver. Here, we use the SpookyNet machine-learning force field (MLFF) together with all-electron density-functional theory calculations to characterize Na storage in aminobenzene-functionalized Janus graphene (Na$_x$AB) at room-temperature. Simulations across state of charge reveal a three-stage storage mechanism-site-specific adsorption at aminobenzene groups and Na$_n$@AB$_m$ structure formation, followed by interlayer gallery filling-contrasting the multi-stage pore-, graphite-interlayer-, and defect-controlled behavior in hard carbon. This leads to an OCV profile with an extended low-voltage plateau of 0.15 V vs. Na/Na$^{+}$, an estimated gravimetric capacity of $\sim$400 mAh g$^{-1}$, negligible volume change, and Na diffusivities of $\sim10^{-6}$ cm$^{2}$ s$^{-1}$, two to three orders of magnitude higher than in hard carbon. Our results establish Janus aminobenzene-graphene as a promising, structurally defined high-capacity Na-ion anode and illustrate the power of MLFF-based simulations for characterizing electrode materials.

AI.tldr: 使用机器学习力场和密度泛函理论研究氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯作为钠离子电池负极，发现其具有高容量、低电压平台、高扩散系数和零体积变化等优异性能
AI.motivation: 钠离子电池需要同时具备高容量、低工作电压、快速钠离子传输和机械稳定性的负极材料，而传统负极难以满足这些要求
AI.method: 使用SpookyNet机器学习力场（MLFF）结合全电子密度泛函理论计算，在室温下表征氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯中的钠存储行为
AI.result: 发现三阶段存储机制：氨基苯基团的位点特异性吸附和Na_n@AB_m结构形成，随后是层间填充。获得0.15 V vs. Na/Na⁺的低电压平台，约400 mAh g⁻¹的比容量，可忽略的体积变化，以及比硬碳高2-3个数量级的钠扩散系数（~10⁻⁶ cm² s⁻¹）
AI.conclusion: 氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯是一种有前景的结构明确的钠离子电池高容量负极材料，展示了基于MLFF的模拟在表征电极材料方面的强大能力

title: Unveiling the magnetic ground states in the iridate double perovskite Pr(2-x)SrxMgIrO6 (x = 0 and 0.5) series
summary: We report here the results of a detailed magnetic, thermodynamic, and neutron powder diffraction (NPD) studies carried out on the double perovskite iridates Pr(2-x)SrxMgIrO6 (x = 0 and 0.5). Temperature dependent bulk DC susceptibility data clearly reveals a sharp antiferromagnetic (AFM) transition at 14.5 K in Pr2MgIrO6(x = 0). Next, a weaker signature of an AFM transition at a lower temperature (6 K) is observed in x = 0.5 i.e., Pr1.5Sr0.5MgIrO6 (PSMIO1505). The observed magnetic transitions are further corroborated by the presence of anomalies around the same temperatures in our T-dependent specific heat results. The charge states of both Pr and Ir cations have been confirmed to be the expected ones (3+ for Pr in both the compounds, while Ir is in a pure 4+ state for x = 0 and in a mixed 4+/5+ state for x = 0.5) from the core-level x-ray photoemission spectroscopy (XPS) measurements. Using neutron powder diffraction (NPD) the magnetic ground states and the magnetic moment values were determined for both compounds. Both the Pr- and Ir-sites undergo AFM ordering below the respective transition temperatures, designated by the propagation vector k = ( 1/2 , 0, 1/2 ), in both the compounds.

AI.tldr: 对双钙钛矿铱酸盐Pr(2-x)SrxMgIrO6 (x=0和0.5)的磁性、热力学和中子粉末衍射研究，揭示了其反铁磁转变和磁基态特性
AI.motivation: 研究双钙钛矿铱酸盐Pr(2-x)SrxMgIrO6的磁性行为，特别是通过Sr掺杂对Ir离子价态和磁相变的影响，以理解这类材料的磁有序机制
AI.method: 采用多种实验技术：温度依赖的直流磁化率测量、比热测量、X射线光电子能谱(XPS)确定离子价态、中子粉末衍射(NPD)确定磁结构和磁矩
AI.result: Pr2MgIrO6在14.5K显示尖锐的反铁磁转变，Pr1.5Sr0.5MgIrO6在6K显示较弱的反铁磁转变。XPS确认Pr为3+价，Ir在x=0时为纯4+价，在x=0.5时为4+/5+混合价态。NPD显示两个化合物中Pr和Ir位点都在各自转变温度以下发生反铁磁有序，传播矢量为k=(1/2,0,1/2)
AI.conclusion: Sr掺杂显著降低了双钙钛矿铱酸盐的反铁磁转变温度，同时改变了Ir离子的价态，但磁有序结构保持不变，表明这类材料的磁性对电子结构变化敏感

title: Improved cycling stability and lithium utilization in trilayer Al-LLZO revealed by Electrochemical cycling performance
summary: Garnet-type Li$_{6.25}$Al$_{0.25}$La$_3$Zr$_2$O$_{12}$ (Al-LLZO) solid electrolytes are promising for all-solid-state batteries but are limited by interfacial resistance. In this work, dense and graded tri-layer Al-LLZO electrolytes were fabricated and tested in Li/Al-LLZO/NMC(111) full cells. After 25 cycles, the tri-layer cell delivered discharge capacity of $\sim$55 mAhg$^{-1}$, nearly twice that of the dense Al-LLZO ($\sim$27 mAhg$^{-1}$). EIS showed lower initial interfacial resistance ($\sim$373 $Ω$) and improved stability. SEM confirmed a porous-dense-porous structure, while NRA revealed enhanced near-surface lithium ($\sim$75%) compared to dense Al-LLZO ($\sim$48%). These results highlight the role of microstructural grading in improving lithium distribution and cell performance.

AI.tldr: 三层梯度结构Al-LLZO固态电解质相比致密结构，在锂金属电池中容量提升近一倍，界面电阻降低，锂分布更均匀。
AI.motivation: 石榴石型Al-LLZO固态电解质虽有前景，但界面电阻限制了其性能，需要改进微结构设计来提升电池性能。
AI.method: 制备致密且具有梯度结构的三层Al-LLZO电解质（多孔-致密-多孔结构），在Li/Al-LLZO/NMC(111)全电池中进行测试，通过EIS、SEM、NRA等手段表征。
AI.result: 25次循环后，三层结构电池放电容量约55 mAhg⁻¹，是致密结构（约27 mAhg⁻¹）的近两倍；初始界面电阻约373 Ω，稳定性改善；近表面锂含量提升至约75%（致密结构约48%）。
AI.conclusion: 微结构梯度设计能有效改善锂分布和电池性能，为固态电解质界面优化提供了有效策略。

title: Spin Elasticity
comment: 39 pages,45 figures;LaTeX;Submitted to Physical Review X (PRX)
summary: Elasticity has long been regarded as a property exclusive to material media. Here we uncover its hidden existence in the spin degree of freedom. We introduce spin elasticity-an intrinsic mechanism that governs recoverable deformation of spin morphology. This discovery reveals a previously unrecognized universality: elasticity operates in both matter and spin spaces, underpinning structural integrity across physical realms. By establishing the missing spin counterpart, this work completes the elastic picture and points toward a broader paradigm where elasticity transcends its conventional boundaries.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现了自旋弹性这一新概念，揭示了弹性不仅存在于物质空间，也存在于自旋空间，从而完善了弹性理论框架。
AI.motivation: 传统上弹性被认为是物质介质的专属属性，但作者认为弹性可能存在于更广泛的物理领域，特别是在自旋自由度中，这为理解物理系统的结构完整性提供了新的视角。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和概念构建，引入"自旋弹性"这一新机制，描述自旋形态的可恢复变形特性，建立自旋空间与物质空间之间的弹性对应关系。
AI.result: 发现了自旋弹性这一内在机制，证明了弹性在物质空间和自旋空间中都存在，揭示了一个以前未被认识的普遍性原理，完善了弹性理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 该工作完成了弹性理论的完整图景，指出弹性超越了传统边界，为理解物理系统结构完整性提供了更广泛的范式，具有重要的理论意义。

title: Hall viscosity and putative quantum Hall states without positive-definite K-matrix
summary: We investigate putative quantum Hall effect states, labeled by their K-matrix equal to (1 1 3), by defining them on the torus and computing their Hall viscosity. Such states have been introduced on the sphere as a phase distinct from Pfaffian and anti-Pfaffian ones. This was done in order to explain certain results on thermal Hall conductivity in favor of particle-hole symmetric Pfaffian topological order in presence of Landau level mixing. The requirements of boundary conditions, modular invariance and ground state degeneracy are enough to uniquely fix the form of the proposed wave functions. We generalize a method to enforce them which we call monodromy matching and check our results on wave functions and Hall viscosity against realizations on the torus of Laughlin and hierarchical states. We highlight the issues in the realization of these states, which turn out to exhibit the formation of clusters. We show that the effect of anti-symmetrization on the system is not enough to prevent clustering; we compute the Hall viscosity for the Halperin version of these states and the fully anti-symmetrized one and we find them being dependent on the geometry and the particle number.

AI.tldr: 研究K-矩阵为(1 1 3)的量子霍尔效应态，通过环面定义计算其霍尔粘度，探讨其与Pfaffian/反Pfaffian态的区别，并分析这些态中的团簇形成问题。
AI.motivation: 为了解释热霍尔电导率实验中支持粒子-空穴对称Pfaffian拓扑序的结果，特别是在存在朗道能级混合的情况下，需要寻找与Pfaffian和反Pfaffian不同的新相。
AI.method: 在环面上定义K-矩阵为(1 1 3)的态，利用边界条件、模不变性和基态简并度要求唯一确定波函数形式，采用单值匹配方法，并与Laughlin态和分层态在环面上的实现进行对比验证。
AI.result: 发现这些态表现出团簇形成现象，反对称化操作不足以防止团簇化；计算了Halperin版本和完全反对称化版本的霍尔粘度，发现它们依赖于几何形状和粒子数。
AI.conclusion: K-矩阵为(1 1 3)的态确实代表了一种与Pfaffian/反Pfaffian不同的新相，但存在团簇形成问题，且其霍尔粘度具有几何和粒子数依赖性，这为理解这些拓扑序的性质提供了重要见解。

title: Ideal band structures for high-performance thermoelectric materials with band convergence
summary: We investigate optimal band structures in band-converged systems to achieve high zT using numerical calculations based on a virtual spectral conductivity model. We consider a two parabolic band system, in which multiple band parameters can be independently controlled. Despite its simplicity, this model provides theoretical validation of empirical trends observed in thermoelectric materials. Our results provide a physically transparent set of design principles for band-structure engineering, offering quantitative design guidelines for the development of a wide range of thermoelectric materials. The main conclusions are as follows: (i) When a band does not cross the chemical potential and |μ-E_edge |>5k_B T, the contribution of the band to zT is negligibly small; (ii) To suppress the bipolar effect, a band gap E_g satisfying E_g>5k_B T_op, where T_op is the operating temperature, is required; (iii) In band-converged systems, the energy separation between the band edge ΔE should satisfy ΔE~0 to maximize zT when interband scattering is insignificant; (iv) Achieving high spectral conductivity Σ (high band degeneracy N, density of states effective mass m_DOS^*, and relaxation time τ) near the band edge is essential for achieving high zT.

AI.tldr: 通过虚拟谱电导模型数值计算研究能带收敛系统中的最优能带结构以实现高zT，提出能带工程的设计原则和定量指导
AI.motivation: 研究热电材料中能带结构对热电性能的影响，为能带工程提供理论依据和设计指导
AI.method: 使用虚拟谱电导模型进行数值计算，考虑双抛物线能带系统，其中多个能带参数可独立控制
AI.result: 提出四个关键设计原则：1) 远离化学势的能带贡献可忽略；2) 需要足够大的带隙抑制双极效应；3) 能带收敛系统中能带边缘能量分离应接近零；4) 需要高谱电导率（高能带简并度、有效质量和弛豫时间）
AI.conclusion: 该研究为热电材料的能带工程提供了物理透明的设计原则和定量指导，有助于开发高性能热电材料

title: Nonlinear suppression of dispersion broadening of ultrashort spin-wave pulses in thin YIG films
summary: We study experimentally the nonlinear propagation of short pulses of forward volume spin waves in nanometer-thick YIG films. We show that nonlinearity of the spin system can efficiently counteract dispersion broadening of the pulses, leading to the formation of envelope solitons. We demonstrate that in microscopic YIG systems, microwave powers of the order of one milliwatt are sufficient to reach the soliton formation threshold. At powers slightly above this threshold, we achieve transmission of 3-ns spin-wave pulses over distances of up to 50 micrometers without increase in their temporal width. Our results demonstrate a promising way towards high-rate transmission of information in microscopic spin-wave circuits unaffected by detrimental dispersion effects.

AI.tldr: 实验研究纳米级YIG薄膜中短脉冲前向体自旋波的非线性传播，发现非线性效应可抵消色散展宽，形成包络孤子，仅需毫瓦级微波功率即可实现3纳秒脉冲在50微米距离内无展宽传输。
AI.motivation: 研究微观自旋波电路中信息传输的色散问题，探索利用非线性效应抵消色散展宽，实现高效无失真的信息传输。
AI.method: 实验研究纳米厚度YIG薄膜中短脉冲前向体自旋波的非线性传播特性，通过控制微波功率观察脉冲传播行为。
AI.result: 发现自旋系统非线性可有效抵消脉冲的色散展宽，形成包络孤子；仅需毫瓦级微波功率即可达到孤子形成阈值；在阈值略高功率下，实现3纳秒自旋波脉冲在50微米距离内传输而无时间宽度增加。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了在微观自旋波电路中实现不受有害色散效应影响的高速率信息传输的可行途径，为自旋波电路应用提供了重要基础。

title: Drinfeld Center as Quantum State Monodromy over Bloch Hamiltonians around Defects
summary:
The Drinfeld center fusion category $\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$ famously models anyons in certain lattice models. Here we demonstrate how its fusion rules may also describe topological order in fractional topological insulator materials, in the vicinity of point defects in the Brillouin zone.
  Concretely, we prove that $\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$ reflects, locally over a punctured disk in the Brillouin zone, the monodromy (topological order) of gapped quantum states over the parameter space of Bloch Hamiltonians whose classifying space has fundamental group $G$.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了Drinfeld中心融合范畴$\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$不仅能描述晶格模型中的任意子，还能描述分数拓扑绝缘体材料中点缺陷附近的拓扑序。
AI.motivation: 探索Drinfeld中心融合范畴$\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$在凝聚态物理中的新应用，特别是将其与分数拓扑绝缘体材料中点缺陷附近的拓扑序联系起来，建立数学范畴论与凝聚态物理之间的新联系。
AI.method: 通过证明$\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$在布里渊区穿孔盘上局部反映了具有基本群$G$的布洛赫哈密顿量参数空间中能隙量子态的拓扑序（monodromy），建立了范畴论结构与物理系统之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 成功证明了Drinfeld中心融合范畴$\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$的融合规则可以描述分数拓扑绝缘体材料中点缺陷附近的拓扑序，为理解这类材料的拓扑性质提供了新的数学框架。
AI.conclusion: Drinfeld中心融合范畴$\mathcal{Z}(\mathrm{Vec}_G)$不仅适用于晶格模型中的任意子描述，还能有效刻画分数拓扑绝缘体材料中点缺陷附近的拓扑序，这为拓扑物态的分类和理解提供了新的数学工具。

title: SAM Molecular Stacking with Heterogeneous Orientationfor High-Performance Perovskite Photovoltaics
summary: This study demonstrates that thermal-evaporated SAM (eSAM) films, particularly in a thick configuration, spontaneously adopt a heterogeneous molecular orientation, forming a vertical-to-horizontal gradient in molecular packing. This unique architecture establishes a graded energy barrier, which is shown to facilitate more efficient hole transport compared with the single energy barrier presented by conventional thin SAMs. In conclusion, while solution-processed SAMs present formidable scalability challenges, the thermal evaporation of SAMs offers a viable pathway toward industrial-scale fabrication. The strategy of employing thick eSAM films with gradient molecular packing not only circumvents the uniformity issues of solution methods but also introduces a superior structure for charge transport, positioning it as a promising enabler for the commercialization of high-efficiency perovskite photovoltaics. The inability to achieve uniform hole transport with solution-processed self-assembled monolayers (SAMs) constitutes a fundamental bottleneck for scaling perovskite photovoltaics. Herein, we demonstrate that thermal-evaporated SAMs (eSAMs) overcome this limitation by enabling precise thickness control. Crucially, a thickened eSAM spontaneously forms a vertical-to-horizontal gradient in molecular orientation, which creates a descending energy barrier that directionally facilitates hole transport. This tailored interface also ensures excellent surface coverage and directs the growth of high-quality perovskite films. Consequently, the resultant photovoltaic devices set new benchmarks, delivering impressive power conversion efficiencies (PCEs) of 21.46% (small-area, 0.108 cm2) and 19.38% (large-area module, 15.52 cm2) for fully vacuum-evaporated devices, while also setting an impressive PCE of 23.67% for eSAM-based devices with solution-processed perovskites.

AI.tldr: 热蒸发自组装单层膜(eSAM)通过形成垂直-水平梯度分子取向，创造了梯度能量势垒，显著提升了钙钛矿光伏器件的空穴传输效率和器件性能。
AI.motivation: 溶液法制备的自组装单层膜(SAMs)存在均匀性问题，难以实现均匀的空穴传输，这成为钙钛矿光伏规模化应用的根本瓶颈。需要寻找能够实现精确厚度控制且具有优异电荷传输性能的替代方法。
AI.method: 采用热蒸发法制备自组装单层膜(eSAM)，通过精确控制厚度，使厚eSAM自发形成垂直-水平梯度分子取向结构。这种梯度结构创造了递减的能量势垒，定向促进空穴传输，同时确保优异的表面覆盖度并引导高质量钙钛矿薄膜的生长。
AI.result: 基于eSAM的光伏器件创造了多项性能纪录：全真空蒸发器件的功率转换效率达到21.46%（小面积0.108 cm²）和19.38%（大面积模块15.52 cm²）；eSAM结合溶液法钙钛矿的器件效率达到23.67%。
AI.conclusion: 热蒸发SAMs为钙钛矿光伏的工业化规模制造提供了可行路径。厚eSAM的梯度分子堆积策略不仅避免了溶液法的均匀性问题，还引入了优异的电荷传输结构，有望推动高效率钙钛矿光伏的商业化应用。

title: Landau-Level-Resolved Mode Mixing and Shot Noise in Gate-Defined Graphene Quantum Point Contacts
summary: Graphene quantum point contacts (QPCs) in the quantum Hall regime host competing transport mechanisms including chiral edge propagation, valley degeneracy, and gate-induced mode mixing. Their interplay is not visible in conductance alone. Shot noise directly probes the statistics of transmission eigenvalues, revealing microscopic mode partitioning that conductance cannot access. We develop a hybrid framework combining tight-binding simulations of gate-defined graphene QPCs with random matrix theory (RMT) to predict shot noise and Fano factor signatures across different quantum Hall regimes, validated against experimental conductance maps of hBN-encapsulated graphene Hall bars. Three distinct regimes are identified: adiabatic propagation, sharp mode filtering, and multi-mode mixing driven by localized states beneath the split gate. For higher Landau levels ($N_L > 0$), complete mode mixing produces the universal chaotic-cavity limit $F \simeq 1/4$. Strikingly, the zeroth Landau level ($N_L = 0$) converges to $F = 1/3$. This distinct value originates in the sublattice polarization of the $N_L = 0$ edge state: coupling to mixed-sublattice localized states beneath the gate is suppressed, confining transport to an effective single channel ($N = 1$). Complete mixing within this single channel yields a flat transmission eigenvalue distribution and hence exactly $F = 1/3$ from single-channel RMT, numerically coincident with but mechanistically distinct from pseudo-diffusive zero-field graphene transport. The $F = 1/3$ versus $F = 1/4$ crossover is a Landau-level-resolved noise signature absent in conductance, providing a direct discriminator between single-channel and multi-channel chaotic transport in graphene QPCs.

AI.tldr: 石墨烯量子点接触在量子霍尔区表现出三种传输机制：绝热传播、锐利模式滤波和多模式混合。通过散粒噪声和法诺因子可区分不同朗道能级的传输特性，其中零朗道能级收敛于F=1/3，高阶朗道能级达到混沌腔极限F=1/4。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯量子点接触在量子霍尔区存在多种竞争传输机制（手性边缘传播、谷简并、栅极诱导模式混合），仅靠电导无法区分这些微观机制。散粒噪声能直接探测传输本征值的统计特性，揭示电导无法访问的微观模式分配。
AI.method: 开发混合框架：结合紧束缚模拟栅极定义的石墨烯量子点接触与随机矩阵理论，预测散粒噪声和法诺因子特征。使用hBN封装石墨烯霍尔棒实验电导图进行验证。
AI.result: 识别三种不同传输机制：绝热传播、锐利模式滤波、栅极下局域态驱动的多模式混合。高阶朗道能级（N_L>0）完全模式混合产生通用混沌腔极限F≈1/4；零朗道能级（N_L=0）收敛于F=1/3，源于其边缘态的子晶格极化特性。
AI.conclusion: F=1/3与F=1/4的交叉是朗道能级分辨的噪声特征，在电导中不存在，为石墨烯量子点接触中单通道与多通道混沌传输提供了直接区分标志。零朗道能级的独特行为源于子晶格极化对混合子晶格局域态耦合的抑制。

title: Exploring self-driving labs for optoelectronic materials
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, accepted manuscript for Faraday Discussion conference on Emerging materials for optoelectronics applications, 1-3 July 2026, Edinburgh, UK
summary: Self-driving laboratories (SDLs), by combining automation with machine learning-guided experiment selection, have the potential to transform experimental materials science. To date, most SDLs have been optimisation-driven, designed to rapidly converge on performance metrics, by embedding multiple mechanistic layers within platform-specific surrogate models. Such approaches excel at process tuning yet offer limited insight into the underlying physics governing synthesis-property relationships. Here we articulate a complementary paradigm: the exploration-driven, or scientific, SDL, whose primary purpose is the generation of data for data-driven science. We exemplify this concept for the case of inorganic optoelectronic materials, arguing that defect physics, which forms the central mechanistic link between synthesis conditions and functional properties, provides the foundation for designing a suitable SDL. Because defect populations and their spatial organisation cannot generally be resolved directly - nor fully predicted from first principles - the task of the SDL is to generate datasets in which thermodynamic and kinetic synthesis variables are systematically perturbed and defect-sensitive observables measured in parallel. From this basis, we propose a set of design principles for scientific SDLs that will enable them to operate close to the physics of optoelectronic materials, thereby generating transferrable and reusable datasets offering radical insight. We use Cu2ZnSn(S,Se)4 as a case study, both to show the scale of the task of defect-aware materials exploration as well to highlight as the deficiencies in the current paradigm. We propose that properly designed SDLs can generate the structured datasets necessary to enable mechanistic inference and advance synthesis-aware materials design.

AI.tldr: 论文提出探索驱动的科学自驱实验室范式，旨在生成用于数据驱动科学的数据，而非仅仅优化性能指标。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数自驱实验室是优化驱动的，专注于快速收敛于性能指标，但缺乏对合成-性质关系背后物理机制的深入理解。需要一种新的范式来生成能够揭示材料物理机制的数据。
AI.method: 提出探索驱动的科学自驱实验室概念，以缺陷物理为核心机制基础，通过系统扰动热力学和动力学合成变量，并行测量缺陷敏感观测值，生成结构化数据集。
AI.result: 以Cu2ZnSn(S,Se)4为案例研究，展示了缺陷感知材料探索的规模，并突出了当前范式的不足。提出了科学自驱实验室的设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 适当设计的自驱实验室能够生成必要的结构化数据集，实现机制推断并推进合成感知的材料设计，为数据驱动科学提供基础。

title: An Exact Conjugation Identity for the Many-Body Wilson-Loop Beyond Quantization
summary: We establish an exact Wilson-loop conjugation identity, $W(-δ)=W(δ)^*$, for the many-body overlap Wilson-loop $W(δ)$ accumulated along a $U(1)$ flux-threading (twist) cycle parametrized by $θ\in[0,2π]$, where $δ$ denotes the bond-dimerization parameter. A minimal sufficient condition is the existence of a composite antiunitary mapping acting on the flux-threaded Hamiltonian family that implements $(δ,θ)\mapsto(-δ,-θ)$. As a concrete demonstration, we construct such a mapping microscopically in a dimerized staggered Hubbard ring at half filling. We then verify the conjugation identity using the density-matrix renormalization group (DMRG) for gapped, nondegenerate ground states along the twist cycle. Importantly, the identity persists in depinned gapped regimes where the Berry-phase $γ\equiv-\arg W$ is not symmetry-quantized; as a corollary, $γ(-δ)=-γ(δ)$ (mod $2π$). More generally, the same conjugation relation applies to any lattice model whose flux-threaded Hamiltonian family is closed under an orientation reversal of the bond pattern (a suitable permutation of link-hopping parameters) combined with a reversal of the flux orientation.

AI.tldr: 论文建立了多体重叠Wilson环的精确共轭恒等式W(-δ)=W(δ)*，该恒等式适用于U(1)通量穿线循环，其中δ为键二聚化参数。
AI.motivation: 研究多体系统中Wilson环在通量穿线过程中的对称性关系，特别是在存在键二聚化参数的情况下，探索其共轭对称性及其对Berry相位的影响。
AI.method: 建立复合反幺正映射的充分条件，在二聚化交错Hubbard环中微观构造映射，并使用密度矩阵重整化群(DMRG)验证共轭恒等式。
AI.result: 证明了精确的Wilson环共轭恒等式W(-δ)=W(δ)*，该恒等式在非钉扎能隙区域仍然成立，导致Berry相位满足γ(-δ)=-γ(δ)(模2π)。
AI.conclusion: Wilson环共轭恒等式为理解多体系统中通量穿线过程的对称性提供了新视角，适用于键图案方向反转与通量方向反转组合的晶格模型。

title: Electric toroidal octupolar symmetry in pyrite FeS$_2$ probed by Raman optical activity
summary: We report Raman optical activity in pyrite FeS$_2$, which hosts an electric toroidal octupolar symmetry. A clear and reproducible sign reversal of the circular intensity difference is observed between neighboring $\{111\}$ faces under cross-circular polarization. The signal appears only for the doubly degenerate $E_g$ phonon mode and is absent for other modes, consistent with symmetry analysis. First-principles calculations reproduce these features, establishing Raman optical activity as a probe of higher-rank axial multipolar symmetry.

AI.tldr: 在具有电环形八极对称性的黄铁矿FeS₂中观察到拉曼光学活性，发现{111}晶面间圆偏振强度差存在符号反转，且仅出现在双重简并Eg声子模式中。
AI.motivation: 探索高阶轴向多极对称性的探测方法，利用拉曼光学活性作为研究具有电环形八极对称性材料的新工具。
AI.method: 通过实验观察FeS₂晶体不同{111}晶面间的拉曼光学活性信号，结合对称性分析和第一性原理计算验证结果。
AI.result: 观察到相邻{111}晶面间圆偏振强度差的明显符号反转，该信号仅出现在双重简并Eg声子模式中，与对称性分析一致，第一性原理计算成功复现这些特征。
AI.conclusion: 拉曼光学活性可作为探测高阶轴向多极对称性的有效探针，为研究具有复杂对称性的材料提供了新方法。

title: Supercurrent-Driven Néel Torque in Superconductor/Altermagnet Hybrids
summary: We predict a supercurrent-driven Néel spin-orbit torque in a superconductor/$d$-wave altermagnet heterostructure, associated with the emergence of spin-triplet correlations. The effect can be understood as a consequence of the supercurrent-induced spin polarization, owing to the interplay between spin-orbit coupling and momentum-dependent spin splitting, as found, for example, in altermagnets. Remarkably, the supercurrent can be tuned by the Néel-vector direction, and the supercurrent-induced torque can both propel magnetic domain walls and reverse the Néel-vector orientation within a domain wall. These findings establish superconductor/altermagnet heterostructures as a versatile platform for the dissipationless control of the Néel vector, with potential applications in racetrack memory, dissipationless superconducting electronics, and unconventional computing.

AI.tldr: 超导体/反铁磁异质结构中存在超流驱动的尼尔自旋轨道力矩，源于自旋三重态关联，可用于无耗散控制尼尔矢量
AI.motivation: 探索超导体与反铁磁材料异质结构中的新型物理效应，特别是利用超流无耗散地控制磁序，为低功耗自旋电子学应用提供新平台
AI.method: 理论预测超导体/反铁磁异质结构中超流驱动的尼尔自旋轨道力矩，分析自旋轨道耦合与动量依赖自旋分裂的相互作用，研究超流诱导的自旋极化效应
AI.result: 预测了超流可调谐的尼尔矢量方向依赖性，超流诱导的力矩既能驱动磁畴壁运动，又能反转畴壁内的尼尔矢量取向
AI.conclusion: 超导体/反铁磁异质结构为尼尔矢量的无耗散控制提供了多功能平台，在赛道存储器、无耗散超导电子学和非常规计算中具有应用潜力

title: Emergent relativistic symmetry from interacting fermions on the honeycomb bilayer
summary: We study the phase diagram of interacting spinless fermions on the honeycomb bilayer at charge neutrality using large-scale quantum Monte Carlo simulations. In the noninteracting limit, the low-energy spectrum features quadratically dispersing bands that touch at the corners of the hexagonal Brillouin zone. Weak to intermediate interactions induce a splitting of each of the quadratic band touching points into four Dirac points, located along high-symmetry directions of the reciprocal lattice. Strong interactions lead to the formation of a layer-polarized charge density wave, which spontaneously breaks the $\mathbb Z_2$ layer inversion symmetry and opens an insulating gap in the spectrum. We show that the semimetal-to-insulator quantum phase transition as a function of interaction is continuous and characterized by emergent relativistic symmetry. Our results for the values of the correlation-length exponent $ν$, the order-parameter anomalous dimension $η_φ$, and the fermion anomalous dimension $η_ψ$ agree with those of the theoretically predicted 2+1D Gross-Neveu-Ising universality class with eight two-component Dirac fermions within less than 5\%\ deviation. We also determine the crossover scale as a function of interaction strength between the nonrelativistic semimetal state at high temperatures, characterized by dynamical critical exponent $z = 2$, and the Dirac semimetal state at intermediates temperatures, characterized by $z=1$. Further reducing the temperature below the crossover scale at a fixed value of the interaction strength above the quantum critical point results in a classical ordering transition in the 2D Ising universality class.

AI.tldr: 通过大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟研究双层石墨烯在电荷中性点的相互作用相图，发现弱相互作用导致二次能带接触点分裂为狄拉克点，强相互作用引发层极化电荷密度波绝缘相，相变属于Gross-Neveu-Ising普适类。
AI.motivation: 研究双层石墨烯在电荷中性点的相互作用效应，探索从半金属到绝缘体的量子相变特性，验证理论预测的普适类。
AI.method: 使用大规模量子蒙特卡洛模拟研究相互作用自旋less费米子在蜂窝双层结构中的相图，分析不同相互作用强度下的能带结构和相变行为。
AI.result: 弱至中等相互作用使二次能带接触点分裂为四个狄拉克点；强相互作用导致层极化电荷密度波绝缘相；半金属-绝缘体量子相变是连续的，具有涌现的相对论对称性，符合2+1D Gross-Neveu-Ising普适类；确定了从z=2到z=1的交叉尺度。
AI.conclusion: 双层石墨烯在电荷中性点表现出丰富的相互作用相图，量子相变属于Gross-Neveu-Ising普适类，验证了理论预测，为理解相关量子材料提供了重要见解。

title: Small-Data Machine Learning Uncovers Decoupled Control Mechanisms of Crystallinity and Surface Morphology in $β$-Ga2O3 Epitaxy
summary: The ultrawide-bandgap semiconductor $β$-Ga2O3 holds exceptional promise for next-generation power electronics and deep-ultraviolet optoelectronics, yet its widespread application is hindered by the lack of cost-effective, high-quality heteroepitaxial thin films. Here, we demonstrate an interpretable machine learning framework that efficiently navigates the complex, multiparameter process space of pulsed laser deposition (PLD) to achieve high-crystallinity $β$-Ga2O3 epitaxy on c-plane sapphire. By systematically benchmarking nine regression algorithms under limited experimental data conditions, we identify quadratic polynomial ridge regression as the optimal surrogate model, which combines predictive accuracy (R$^2$ $\approx$ 0.86) with full physical transparency through explicit analytical coefficients. Coupling this model with SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) analysis and iterative experimental design, we construct a closed-loop optimization workflow that progressively refines the process-performance landscape over only three experimental rounds. This data-efficient strategy reduces the X-ray rocking curve (RC) full-width at half-maximum (FWHM) by 70$\%$ from > 3$^{\circ}$ to 0.92$^{\circ}$, which is the best reported value for PLD-grown $β$-Ga2O3 on sapphire. Intriguingly, concurrent modeling of surface roughness reveals that crystalline quality and surface morphology are governed by distinct dominant factors: temperature primarily controls bulk crystallinity, whereas oxygen pressure dictates surface kinetics. This decoupled mechanism, quantitatively captured for the first time via feature importance analysis, provides actionable physical insight for independent optimization of structural and morphological properties. Our work establishes a generalizable, resource-efficient paradigm for intelligent process development in oxide epitaxy and beyond.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了一个可解释的机器学习框架，通过数据高效的方式优化脉冲激光沉积工艺，成功在蓝宝石上生长出高质量β-Ga2O3薄膜，将X射线摇摆曲线半高宽降低了70%。
AI.motivation: β-Ga2O3作为超宽带隙半导体在功率电子和深紫外光电子领域具有巨大潜力，但缺乏低成本、高质量的异质外延薄膜限制了其广泛应用。传统工艺开发需要大量实验试错，效率低下。
AI.method: 开发了可解释的机器学习框架，在有限实验数据条件下系统比较了九种回归算法，选择二次多项式岭回归作为最优代理模型。结合SHAP分析和迭代实验设计，构建了闭环优化工作流程，仅通过三轮实验就实现了工艺优化。
AI.result: 成功将X射线摇摆曲线半高宽从>3°降低到0.92°，降低了70%，这是PLD在蓝宝石上生长β-Ga2O3的最佳报道值。同时发现结晶质量和表面粗糙度由不同因素主导：温度主要控制体结晶度，而氧压决定表面动力学。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了一个通用、资源高效的智能工艺开发范式，通过可解释的机器学习方法实现了氧化物外延工艺的优化，为独立优化结构和形态特性提供了可操作的物理见解。

title: Magnetocaloric Effect of Pure and Diluted Quantum Magnet Yb$_3$Ga$_5$O$_{12}$
summary: The magnetocaloric effect in the quantum dipolar magnet Yb$_3$Ga$_5$O$_{12}$ is studied both for pure material and with non-magnetic substitution: (Yb$_{1-x}$Y$_x$)$_3$Ga$_5$O$_{12}$. Magnetization measurements have been performed on a single crystal, $x=0$, and on powder samples with $x = 0.2$ and 0.4 in the temperature range between 70 mK to 300 K and in magnetic fields up to 8 T. The magnetic entropy change $ΔS_m$, a key figure of merit for adiabatic demagnetization refrigeration, has been derived from the magnetization data. The $x=0.2$ sample exhibits the volumetric entropy variation comparable to, and at low fields even enhanced relative to, the pure compound. In contrast, the 40\%\ diluted sample shows a reduced effect, consistent with the conventional dilution picture. The Curie-Weiss law fits reveal positive Curie temperatures in both diluted samples, indicating the persistence of ferromagnetic correlations. The robustness of the magnetocaloric response upon moderate dilution highlights the potential of YbGG-based materials for low-temperature magnetic cooling applications, particularly in addressing thermal conductivity challenges through the chemical substitution without compromising cooling power.

AI.tldr: 研究量子偶极磁体Yb3Ga5O12及其非磁性Y取代样品(Yb1-xYx)3Ga5O12的磁热效应，发现适度稀释(x=0.2)样品在低场下磁热效应甚至增强，而高稀释(x=0.4)样品效应减弱，表明YbGG基材料在低温磁冷却应用中具有潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究量子偶极磁体Yb3Ga5O12的磁热效应，探索通过非磁性Y取代来优化材料性能，特别是解决热导率问题而不牺牲冷却能力，为低温磁冷却应用开发新材料。
AI.method: 对纯样品(x=0)单晶和掺杂样品(x=0.2, 0.4)粉末进行磁化测量，温度范围70 mK-300 K，磁场高达8 T。从磁化数据推导磁熵变ΔS_m，通过居里-外斯定律拟合分析磁相关性。
AI.result: x=0.2样品的体积熵变与纯样品相当，在低场下甚至增强；而x=0.4样品效应减弱。居里-外斯拟合显示两个稀释样品都有正居里温度，表明铁磁相关性持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 适度稀释的YbGG材料在保持磁热效应的同时，有望通过化学取代解决热导率问题，而不损害冷却能力，显示出在低温磁冷却应用中的潜力。

title: Visualizing spin-polarization of an altermagnet KV$_2$Se$_2$O via spin-selective tunneling
summary: Altermagnetism, a recently identified magnetic phase that combines vanishing net magnetization with momentum-dependent spin splitting, challenges the conventional dichotomy between ferromagnets and antiferromagnets. While several candidate materials have been proposed, direct experimental evidence linking crystal symmetry, electronic structure and d-wave spin polarization remains scarce. Here we report the visualization of a metallic d-wave altermagnet in KV2Se2O. Through spin-selective scanning tunneling microscopy powered by a topological insulator tip, we uncover symmetry-protected momentum-dependent spin splitting that follows a characteristic d-wave form factor. Our results establish KV2Se2O as a tunable platform to study the interplay between spin-valley locking, Fermi-surface instability and unconventional magnetism, and open a pathway toward symmetry-engineered spintronics without net magnetization.

AI.tldr: KV2Se2O被实验确认为金属性d波交变磁体，通过自旋选择性扫描隧道显微镜直接观测到对称性保护的动量依赖自旋劈裂，为无净磁化的对称性工程自旋电子学开辟新途径。
AI.motivation: 交变磁性作为新发现的磁性相，结合了零净磁化和动量依赖自旋劈裂特性，挑战了传统铁磁与反铁磁的二分法。虽然已有候选材料提出，但连接晶体对称性、电子结构和d波自旋极化的直接实验证据仍然稀缺。
AI.method: 使用拓扑绝缘体尖端驱动的自旋选择性扫描隧道显微镜，对KV2Se2O材料进行可视化研究，揭示对称性保护的动量依赖自旋劈裂。
AI.result: 在KV2Se2O中观测到遵循特征d波形因子的动量依赖自旋劈裂，确认其为金属性d波交变磁体，建立了研究自旋-谷锁定、费米面不稳定性和非常规磁性相互作用的可调平台。
AI.conclusion: KV2Se2O作为交变磁体的实验确认为无净磁化的对称性工程自旋电子学开辟了新途径，为研究自旋-谷锁定、费米面不稳定性和非常规磁性的相互作用提供了可调平台。

title: In-plane and out-of-plane electric dipoles and phase transitions in 2D-layered TlGaS2
summary: Out-of-plane and in-plane electric polarization, which rarely coexist in a two-dimensional (2D) ferroelectric material, offer different advantages in ferroelectricity-based devices. Here, we report the coexistence of in-plane and out-of-plane electric dipoles, along with various phase transitions, in 2D van der Waals layered TlGaS2 single crystal. Quantum paraelectricity was observed along both in-plane and out-of-plane directions of the TlGaS2 crystal. Detailed investigation of the quantum paraelectric soft-mode behavior reveals a close correlation between the electric dipoles and the off-center displacement of Tl1+ ions with 6s2 lone pairs in TlGaS2. Anomalies near temperatures of about 120 K and 60-75 K in dielectric and/or infrared spectra indicate the existence of local or weak long-range structural transitions in TlGaS2. Our results provide important experimental evidence for elucidating the phase transitions and coexistence of in-plane and out-of-plane electric dipoles in 2D layered TlGaS2.

AI.tldr: 二维TlGaS2晶体中同时存在面内和面外电极化，并观察到量子顺电性及多个相变
AI.motivation: 二维铁电材料中很少同时存在面内和面外电极化，而这两种极化在铁电器件中各有优势。研究TlGaS2晶体中这两种极化的共存机制及其相变行为具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过介电谱和红外光谱研究二维范德华层状TlGaS2单晶，分析其量子顺电软模行为，探究电极化与Tl1+离子离中心位移的关联。
AI.result: 在TlGaS2晶体中同时观测到面内和面外电极化共存，并发现量子顺电性。介电和红外光谱在约120K和60-75K附近出现异常，表明存在局部或弱长程结构相变。电极化与具有6s2孤对电子的Tl1+离子的离中心位移密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为阐明二维层状TlGaS2中相变及面内和面外电极化共存提供了重要实验证据，有助于理解二维铁电材料中极化机制。

title: Universal inverse-cube thickness scaling of projectile penetration energy in ultrathin films
summary: Ultrathin films of widely different materials exhibit a dramatic enhancement of projectile penetration resistance under high--velocity impact. Despite extensive simulations and experiments, a unifying physical explanation has remained elusive. Here we show that the thickness dependence of the specific penetration energy obeys a universal law, $E_p^*(h)=E_{p,\infty}^*+B h^{-3}$, independent of chemical composition and degree of disorder. The inverse--cube scaling is traced back to a finite--size correction to the effective shear modulus arising from the suppression of long--wavelength nonaffine deformation modes in confined solids. The scaling quantitatively describes impact data for multilayer graphene, graphene oxide, and polymer thin films, revealing a common elastic origin for nanoscale impact resistance.

AI.tldr: 超薄材料薄膜在高速度冲击下表现出显著增强的抗穿透能力，其厚度依赖性遵循普适的逆立方标度律，源于受限固体中长波长非仿射变形模式的抑制。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量模拟和实验研究，但不同材料的超薄薄膜在高速度冲击下表现出显著增强的抗穿透能力，其背后的统一物理机制尚未阐明。
AI.method: 通过分析厚度对特定穿透能量的依赖性，发现其遵循普适标度律 $E_p^*(h)=E_{p,\infty}^*+B h^{-3}$，并将此逆立方标度追溯到受限固体中有效剪切模量的有限尺寸修正，源于长波长非仿射变形模式的抑制。
AI.result: 该普适标度律独立于化学组成和有序程度，定量描述了多层石墨烯、氧化石墨烯和聚合物薄膜的冲击数据，揭示了纳米尺度抗冲击能力的共同弹性起源。
AI.conclusion: 超薄薄膜的抗穿透能力增强源于受限固体中长波长非仿射变形模式的抑制导致的弹性效应，这一普适机制为不同材料的纳米尺度抗冲击性能提供了统一解释。

title: Interlayer-coupling-driven stabilization and superconductivity in bilayer CoTe$_2$
summary: Interlayer coupling plays a critical role in van der Waals materials by governing lattice stability and emergent quantum phases, yet its impact on few-layer hexagonal CoTe$_2$ remains unclear. Here, using first-principles calculations, we systematically investigate monolayer and bilayer CoTe$_2$ with an emphasis on their electronic structures, lattice dynamics, and electron-phonon coupling, and elucidate the underlying mechanisms driven by interlayer interactions. Our results show that monolayer CoTe$_2$ exhibits pronounced dynamical instability at low temperatures, whereas interlayer coupling stabilizes the bilayer crystal structure and gives rise to phonon-mediated superconductivity with a predicted critical temperature of about $4.7$~K. The stabilization and superconductivity in bilayer CoTe$_2$ are primarily attributed to interlayer-coupling-induced Te-$p_z$ charge redistribution and the associated modification of the Fermi surface and electron-phonon coupling. Finally, we discuss how spin-orbit coupling in bilayer CoTe$_2$ weakens the EPC and suppresses superconductivity. Our work clarifies how interlayer coupling can jointly tune structural stability and superconductivity in few-layer CoTe$_2$, providing insights for engineering quantum phases in layered transition-metal dichalcogenides.

AI.tldr: 双层CoTe₂通过层间耦合稳定晶格结构并诱导声子介导的超导性，临界温度约4.7K，而单层在低温下存在动力学不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究层间耦合对少层六方CoTe₂的影响，特别是对晶格稳定性和超导性等量子相的调控作用。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，系统研究单层和双层CoTe₂的电子结构、晶格动力学和电子-声子耦合，分析层间相互作用的机制。
AI.result: 单层CoTe₂在低温下表现出明显的动力学不稳定性，而层间耦合稳定了双层晶体结构，并诱导出声子介导的超导性，预测临界温度约4.7K。自旋轨道耦合会削弱电子-声子耦合并抑制超导性。
AI.conclusion: 层间耦合能够共同调控少层CoTe₂的结构稳定性和超导性，为工程化层状过渡金属二硫属化物中的量子相提供了重要见解。

title: Crystallographic Orientation-Dependent Magnetotransport in the Layered Antiferromagnet -- CrSBr
summary: Among two-dimensional magnetic materials, CrSBr has attracted considerable attention owing to its coexistence of ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic ordering, which depends sensitively on crystallographic orientation. An additional distinguishing feature of CrSBr is its highly anisotropic Fermi surface in momentum space. In this work, we present a comprehensive investigation of magnetoresistance by systematically orienting the bias current and the applied magnetic field along all three crystallographic axes. We demonstrate that the magnetoresistance serves as a direct probe of electronic anisotropy, exhibiting pronounced variations when the current is applied along different crystallographic directions under a magnetic field perpendicular to the sample plane. For in-plane magnetic fields, we observe conventional anisotropic magnetoresistance accompanied by hysteresis, indicative of ferromagnetic behavior. Overall, our study provides a complete picture of electronic transport in CrSBr as a function of bias current and magnetic field orientation with respect to crystallographic directions, thereby opening pathways for future experiments requiring high sensitivity of electrical resistance to magnetic field gradients.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过系统研究CrSBr在不同电流和磁场方向下的磁阻特性，揭示了其电子各向异性与磁有序之间的关联，为基于磁阻效应的器件应用提供了基础。
AI.motivation: CrSBr作为一种二维磁性材料，同时具有铁磁和反铁磁有序，且其费米面在动量空间高度各向异性。然而，对其电子输运特性与晶体取向、磁场方向之间关系的系统性研究尚不完整。
AI.method: 通过系统性地将偏置电流和施加磁场沿所有三个晶轴方向排列，全面研究CrSBr的磁阻特性。特别关注电流沿不同晶向时，垂直于样品平面的磁场下的磁阻变化，以及面内磁场下的磁阻行为。
AI.result: 1. 磁阻可作为电子各向异性的直接探针，当电流沿不同晶向且磁场垂直于样品平面时，磁阻表现出显著变化；2. 对于面内磁场，观察到伴随滞后的常规各向异性磁阻，表明铁磁行为；3. 获得了电流和磁场相对于晶向取向的完整电子输运图像。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为CrSBr的电子输运特性提供了全面的理解，揭示了磁阻与晶体取向、磁场方向的密切关系，为未来需要电阻对磁场梯度高灵敏度的实验开辟了途径，特别是在基于磁阻效应的器件应用方面具有重要价值。

title: Orbital-specific Itinerancy and Localization in a Kagome Magnet
summary: The kagome lattice naturally hosts flat bands, Dirac fermions, and van Hove singularities, yet whether its geometry can stabilize orbital-selective phases - a hallmark of Hund's physics in multi-orbital correlated systems - has remained an open question. Here, we combine resonant inelastic X-ray scattering with density functional theory and dynamical mean-field theory to demonstrate that YMn$_6$Sn$_6$ exhibits a spontaneous orbital differentiation into coexisting itinerant and localized electrons within the same Mn $3d$ manifold. Orbitals directed along Mn-Mn bonds provide coherent quasiparticles and metallic bands, while those pointing toward ligands become strongly correlated and display non-Fermi-liquid behavior. Hund's intra-atomic exchange suppresses orbital fluctuations, stabilizing this dichotomy and providing a natural double-exchange-like mechanism for the observed ferromagnetic bilayer coupling. Our work establishes YMn$_6$Sn$_6$ as a kagome platform where orbital selectivity, flat-band topology, and Hund's metallicity converge - revealing that geometric frustration and correlation-driven orbital differentiation can cooperatively design exotic quantum phases beyond the canonical paradigms of Mott physics or band topology alone.

AI.tldr: 在YMn₆Sn₆中，kagome晶格几何与强关联效应协同作用，实现了同一Mn 3d壳层内的轨道选择性分化，形成共存巡游电子与局域电子的奇异量子相。
AI.motivation: 探索kagome晶格几何是否能够稳定轨道选择性相——这是多轨道强关联系统中Hund物理的标志性特征。传统上认为轨道选择性主要出现在具有不同能带宽度的轨道之间，但本文研究在相同轨道壳层内是否也能出现这种分化。
AI.method: 结合共振非弹性X射线散射(RIXS)、密度泛函理论(DFT)和动力学平均场理论(DMFT)三种方法，系统研究YMn₆Sn₆的电子结构和轨道特性。
AI.result: 发现Mn 3d轨道自发分化为两种类型：沿Mn-Mn键方向的轨道形成相干准粒子和金属能带，而指向配体方向的轨道则表现出强关联特征和非费米液体行为。Hund原子内交换抑制了轨道涨落，稳定了这种二分性，并为观测到的铁磁双层耦合提供了类似双交换的机制。
AI.conclusion: YMn₆Sn₆作为kagome平台，实现了轨道选择性、平带拓扑和Hund金属性的融合，表明几何阻挫和关联驱动的轨道分化可以协同设计超越传统Mott物理或能带拓扑范式的新型量子相。
